2026-06-02 (PM/Evening): Plan 123 V*.2+ followups umbrella — landed on
branch plan-123-v2-followups (NOT merged; pushed for review).

Branch: plan-123-v2-followups
Worktree: nova-p123
Commits (10 total, in order):
1. Baseline test pattern fix (..Default::default() spread for FnDecl/
   TypeDecl/RecordField — final fix for the recurring "AST struct
   addition broke fixtures" pattern, see prior baseline-fix entries).
2. Plan 123.7.2 V7.2 — explicit IpaCtx parameter threading. Replaces
   V7.1 thread-local LICM_WRITE_SETS/PURE_IPA_CTX/CHAIN_IPA_CTX with
   explicit Option<IpaCtx<'_>> through licm_fn / pure_cache_fn /
   chain_cache_fn pass chain. Wrappers clone recv_type into local
   String to detach from &mut f aliasing. thread_local!{} block
   deleted. Future-ready for multi-threaded compilation.
3. Plan 123.6.3 V6.3 — configurable gate thresholds. Adds
   ipa_iter_limit to FieldCacheConfig (env NOVA_FIELD_CACHE_IPA_ITER,
   CLI --field-cache-ipa-iter=N, clamp 1..=1024). Adds
   --telemetry-gate-affected-drop=F and --telemetry-gate-caches-drop=F
   to override V6.1 hardcoded 5pp/10% gates with non-negative
   validation. Defaults preserve V6.1 behavior.
4. Plan 123.5.2 V5.2 — LSP semantic tokens. Adds semantic_tokens_provider
   capability (legend: PROPERTY type + readonly|cached modifiers).
   compute_field_cache_semantic_tokens scans @<field> reads and
   tags those analyze_module says will be CSE'd. Editors that honor
   custom modifiers (VS Code, Helix) get distinctive coloring; others
   fall back to readonly styling.
5. Plan 123.5.3 V5.3 — LSP quickfix add #pure. Adds non-diagnostic-
   driven CodeAction suggesting #pure on analytically-pure
   instance methods (empty write-set closure + no effects + no
   concurrent constructs + no #pure already). Insertion at column 0
   of fn-line.
6. Plan 123.3.2 V3.2 — tuple/record literal args in PureCallKey.
   Extends canonical_literal_repr to TupleLit (T<N>{...}) and
   RecordLit (R<TypeName>{f1:v1;...} sorted alphabetically). Rejects
   spread, shorthand-pun, D55 inferred_map_v markers. Recursive.
7. Plan 123.4.2 V4.2 — chain prefix sharing. When >=2 cached chains
   share a length-2 prefix (e.g. @a.b.c and @a.b.d), emit a single
   `_at_a_b_pre = @a.b` let; per-chain lets reference it via
   ident.tail instead of @full.chain. Reduces @<root> reads.
8. Plan 123.6.2 V6.2 — Plan 57 nova bench integration. Adds
   cpu_savings_estimate(report) -> CpuSavingsReport with cycle
   weights (NOVA_FC_LOAD_CYCLES=4, NOVA_FC_CALL_CYCLES=40,
   NOVA_FC_LOOP_ITERS=8). Telemetry JSON emits cycles_saved_estimate
   + 5 per-layer fields; baseline regression gate fires on > 10% drop.
9. Plan 123.7.3 V7.3 — SCC-based exact closure. Replaces V7's
   bounded-iteration closure with Tarjan SCC + reverse-topological
   propagation in O(V+E). Iterative work-stack DFS (no Rust stack
   risk). NOVA_FC_LEGACY_ITERATIVE_CLOSURE=1 falls back to V7 path.
10. Logs + push (this commit).

Tests added:
- field_cache lib tests: 25 baseline → 32 (+7 V3.2 / +2 V4.2 /
  +2 V6.2 / +5 V7.3) — all PASS.

== 2026-06-02 (late session) — Plan 114.4.4 V4.5 Ф.3 + Ф.4 generics LANDED
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p114-4
> Branch: plan-114.4.4-v4-followups-Ф3 (off main 3d14c6ab5fa)

🎯 Cumulative: Plan 114.4.4 family полностью закрыта (V3-V4.5).

Замысел:
V4.4 followups bundle оставил Ф.3 (generic-trampoline) + Ф.4 (generic-closure)
DEFERRED для design pending. В этой sub-сессии implemented обоих через
HOF type inference (Ф.3) + explicit TurboFish (Ф.4) — оба approach
без parser changes.

Ф.3 implementation (commit 599a78c75f4):
- ~600 LOC в const_fn_trampoline.rs.
- GenericInst (name, concrete_types) — instance key с mangled name.
- build_fn_signature_registry: map non-const fn name → params types.
- infer_generic_subst: structural unification против expected Func type.
- unify_type: recursive по Named/Tuple/Array/FixedArray/Func/Unit/Readonly.
- GenericMutateCtx: mutating walker — на каждом Call.args site inferences
  type args + rewrite Ident в-place к mangled name (multiple instantiations
  same name нельзя disambiguate в later rewriter pass).
- generate_generic_trampoline_decl: clone FnDecl + substitute generic params
  в TypeRef positions + drop generics list + demote modifiers.
- subst_type_refs_in_body: walk body, substitute T в As/Is/TurboFish positions.
- 3 fixtures: trampoline_generic_inferred_ok / _two_types_ok / _no_context_neg.
- 1 V4.2-superseded fixture removed.

Ф.4 implementation (commit 21d3cfbb110):
- ~150 LOC delta в const_fn_closure.rs.
- Spec key extended: HashMap<(name, const_args, type_mangle), spec_name>.
- Call rewriter принимает BOTH Ident(name) AND TurboFish(Ident(name), type_args).
- generate_closure_spec substitutes generic types в:
  * host return signature (для extract_func_signature)
  * closure params types
  * closure body types (As/Is/TurboFish positions)
- Uses const_fn_trampoline::subst_type_ref_pub (cross-module re-export).
- 3 fixtures: closure_generic_ok / closure_generic_const_arg_ok / _no_turbofish_neg.

Pattern:
- Ф.3 chose HOF inference (no TurboFish needed at HOF use site — natural UX).
- Ф.4 chose explicit TurboFish (closure-returning fn called directly, no
  HOF context для inference).
- Different solutions для different problems — не contradicting.

Тесты (release nova-cli): 36/36 plan114_4_4 + 15/15 plan114_4_2 + 14/14
plan114_4_3 = 65/65 PASS на release nova-cli.

Spec D199 V4.5 extensions subsection + A39 (trampoline-generic) +
A40 (closure-generic) acceptance criteria.

Cumulative: 11 markers closed (Plan 114.4.4 family), A1-A40, 65 fixtures.

Lessons:
- Multiple instantiations same name require in-place rewrite at
  detection site (separate maps name→mangled don't disambiguate).
- Structural unification simpler than expected — recursive descent
  через TypeRef variants.

=== Plan 123.6.2.1 — Real wall-clock bench (V6.2.1, 2026-06-03) ===

Followup `[M-123.6-real-wallclock-bench]` closure. Расширяет V6.2
static cycle-savings estimate реальным wallclock измерением full-program
runtime impact.

Subcommand: `nova bench field-cache <PATH>` builds каждый input twice
(NOVA_FIELD_CACHE=1 vs =0), runs N interleaved samples (default 11) с
warmup (default 2), reports median wallclock + speedup + V6.2 static
estimate side-by-side.

Implementation (~470 LOC):
- nova-cli/src/bench/field_cache_wallclock.rs (NEW, 410 LOC) — runner,
  median, geomean (log-domain), static-estimate reuse, JSON v1 emit,
  baseline gate.
- nova-cli/src/bench/mod.rs +1 line.
- nova-cli/src/main.rs +75 LOC — BenchCmd::FieldCache variant + dispatch.
- bench/field_cache/01_ro_hot_loop.nv (40 LOC) — three @ro reads inner
  loop × 400k iterations.
- bench/field_cache/02_chain_heavy.nv (40 LOC) — @inner.m.{x,y,z}.v
  chain accesses share prefix.

Verification (release nova-cli + clang):
- 12/12 unit tests PASS (median odd/even/empty, geomean three-files/
  empty/skip-exclusion, JSON shape, has_fn_main pos/neg, truncate,
  fmt_ns scales).
- Live integration: 01_ro_hot_loop.nv off=77.08ms, on=54.50ms,
  speedup=+29.30%, static=200 cyc (5 samples, 1 warmup, --gc malloc).
- Baseline gate fires correctly (fake high baseline → drop=54.7pp >
  2.0pp threshold → exit 1) + passes when drop < threshold.
- Dir mode discovers both fixtures; non-main files (test-only) skip
  cleanly with status "skip: no fn main".

Spec: D217 amend V6.2.1 (~120 lines) — CLI surface, JSON v1 schema,
baseline gate semantics, V6.2.1.1-V6.2.1.6 acceptance criteria.

Plan doc: docs/plans/123.6.2.1-real-wallclock-bench.md.

Cross-validation result (informal): static estimate (200 cyc) and
measured speedup (+29.30%) both positive on the same fixture — V6.2
weights pass first sanity check. V6.2.3 (future) will run least-squares
fit across a larger corpus.

Lessons:
- subprocess-based dual-build (env override) cleaner than in-process
  variant — no need to thread FieldCacheConfig через test_runner pipeline.
- interleaved sampling (off-on-off-on...) меньше systematic drift bias
  чем sequential-by-variant.
- geomean(1+speedup_i/100) лучше arithmetic mean of speedups для
  composite ratio reports (Hennessy & Patterson §1.10).
- short-runtime subprocesses на Windows показывают high sample variance
  (OS scheduler noise) — median handles outliers, но рекомендуется
  samples >= 11 для stable signal в CI.

=== Plan 114.4.4 lesson (continued) ===

- Pub re-export через wrapper fn (subst_type_ref_pub) — clean way share
  helpers cross-module без exposing all internals.

for stack allocation (Kotlin/Java Valhalla pattern).

- D33 amend: binding propagation rules (ro/mut propagate by default).
- D52 amend: 7-я форма value record + `value` contextual keyword.
- D175 amend: binding dominates (ro acc blocks all writes, even mut field).
- D176 amend: mut T в binding type annotation (closes pre-existing gap).
- D215 amend: multi-line tuple + binding-level mutability.
- D222 amend: tuple priv portion retract; protocol impl boundary preserved.
- D225 retract: type-level priv flip для tuples removed.
- D228 NEW (renumbered from D226 on 2026-06-03 — main concurrently took
  D226 «signed indexing» + D227 «numeric literal inference»):
  value-record core allocation contract.

plan115 + plan118.

== 2026-06-03 — Plan 114.4.4 V4.6 M1+M2+M3+M4 final-followups LANDED

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p114-4

M1 sizeof для user records + sums (commit 1932099ed31):
- type_size_or_align_resolved: accepts TypeDecl registry.
- TypeDeclRegistryGuard (RAII): install/clear thread-local registry.
- Records → C struct layout. Sums → tag (i32) + max payload.

- Newtype/Alias transparent. Opaque/Effect/Protocol → None.

- looks_like_closure_light_params: lookahead peek `|ident<,ident>*|`.
- В parse_bit_or: if detected → break bit-or continuation.
- ClosureLight `|x|` после const Stmt теперь works (V4.4 workaround
  через fn(x T) -> R => body больше не нужен).

M3 closure-generic HOF inference (commit 722120e11ef):
- GenericClosureHofCtx pre-pass: walks module, at Call sites checks args.
- For bare Call(generic_closure_fn, [], None), matches host's return Func
  vs expected param Func via unify_simple. Wraps Ident в TurboFish.
- Pub re-exports: build_fn_signature_registry_pub + infer_generic_subst_pub.

M4 composite concrete types (commit c205a7a1589):
- GenericInst.concrete: Vec<String> → Vec<TypeRef>.
- Hash/Eq via mangled_args() stable serialization.
- mangle_type_ref pub helper: Tuple/Array/FixedArray/Named-with-generics/
  Unit/Readonly/Func.
- Closure spec value: (spec_name, Vec<TypeRef>) — TypeRefs retained для
  substitution.

Тесты (release nova-cli): 41/41 plan114_4_4 + 15/15 plan114_4_2 + 14/14
plan114_4_3 = 70/70 PASS на release nova-cli. 6 new POS fixtures + 1
V4.4-superseded NEG removed.

Spec D199 V4.6 extensions subsection + A41-A44 acceptance criteria.
Q7 V4.6 closure notes + 🎯🎯 Plan 114.4.4 family complete marker (V3-V4.6).

Cumulative Plan 114.4.4 family:
- 15 markers [M-114.4.4-*] all closed.
- A1-A44 acceptance criteria.
- 70 fixtures (plan114_4_2/3/4) all PASS.
- 7 walkers/passes в const_fn_* family.
- ~7 sessions wall-time.

Lessons:
- Thread-local registry pattern (TypeDeclRegistryGuard RAII) — clean
  way avoid invasive parameter threading через many call sites.
  Trade-off: implicit context. OK для single-threaded compile pass.
- Parser lookahead disambiguation: peek_at(i) с newlines skip — generic
  pattern для resolving ambiguity at expression-start positions.
- Pre-pass + TurboFish injection (M3): cleaner than extending main
  rewriter с extra logic. Existing handler picks up rewritten form.
- Composite type mangling via stable serialization: removes simple-Named
  restriction enabling rich generic instantiation.

=== Plan 123.4.3 — Deep chain prefix sharing (V4.3, 2026-06-03) ===

Followup `[M-123.4-deep-prefix-sharing]` closure. Расширяет V4.2 length-2
prefix sharing к length-3+ через iterative deepening + parent prefix
chaining.

Algorithm: для prefix-длины L = 2..max_path_len, группируем chains по
path[..L]. Для ≥2-element groups alloc'им `_at_<segs>_pre` с reference
на longest existing shallower parent. Emission shorter-first так что
deeper prefix строится из shallower через `<parent>.<remaining>` chain.
Per-chain lets picks LONGEST covering prefix (не just length-2).

Implementation (~280 LOC):
- compiler-codegen/src/field_cache.rs:
  - struct PrefixInfo { name, span, parent } (NEW)
  - fn compute_chain_prefix_sharing — replaced V4.2 length-2-only с
    iterative deepening (~60 LOC)
  - fn find_longest_existing_parent (NEW, 10 LOC)
  - fn find_chain_shared_prefix — now picks longest, walks rev (15 LOC)
  - emission loop — sort key `(len, lex)`, parent-aware value (~20 LOC)
  - 6 unit tests v43_* (length-3, parent ref, longest cover, no
    spurious, length-4 chain, emission order)
- nova_tests/plan123_4_3/ — 3 runtime fixtures:
  - v43_deep_prefix_three_level_ok.nv (positive length-3 sharing)
  - v43_no_deep_prefix_three_distinct_chains_ok.nv (negative — only L2)
  - v43_mixed_length_chains_ok.nv (mixed length-3 + length-5 chains)

Verification (release nova-cli + clang):
- 8 V4.3 unit tests PASS (including length-4 + emission order).
- 3 runtime fixtures PASS via `nova test nova_tests/plan123_4_3`.
- Zero regressions:
  - plan123_4 (V4 baseline) 10/10 PASS
  - plan123_4_2 (V4.2 baseline) 1/1 PASS
  - field_cache lib tests 37/37 PASS (8 v43 + 2 v42 + 27 baseline)

Spec: D217 amend V4.3 (~110 lines) — algorithm, emission order,
composition, V4.3.1-V4.3.8 acceptance criteria.

Plan doc: docs/plans/123.4.3-deep-prefix-sharing.md.

Pattern lesson:
- Iterative deepening + parent chaining clean way support O(depth)
  sharing — alternative recursive LCA computation сложнее без
  benefit (same algorithmic depth).
- Sort key `(len, lex)` для deterministic emission order critical
  когда deeper prefix references shallower — wrong order breaks codegen.
- Per-chain "longest cover first" rule via walking
  `(2..path.len()).rev()` дёт правильное hop minimization без
  global optimization.

Followup markers:
- [M-123.4.3-cross-fn-prefix-sharing] — V4.4 module-level CSE.
- [M-123.4.3-mut-prefix] — V4.5 mut-root prefix.

Industry edge: Nova становится первым языком с unified type X { ... }
syntax + explicit `value` modifier для stack allocation. Achievement
positions Nova ahead-of-curve vs Kotlin value class (single-field) и
Java Valhalla (incoming).

- NamedTuple (Plan 120 D215) codegen path = clean template для value-
  record: typedef struct NovaValue_X, inline allocation, & receiver.

  для value receivers — avoids per-call special-casing.
- AllocKind enum (Heap/Value) orthogonal to ownership/visibility =
  modular extension; не trespass на existing record paths.
- Forward-decl branching on AllocKind prevents Nova_X / NovaValue_X name
  conflict при mixed allocation в same module.

2026-06-03 — Plan 118 V1 foundational FFI primitives (RawMem +
usize/isize + []T as_ptr/as_mut_ptr) landed
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Worktree: nova-p118 / branch plan-118. Three commits:
  - 37629325392 — D226 amend: usize/isize built-in platform-pointer
    aliases (usize↔u64, isize↔i64 on 64-bit; C size_t ABI).
  - e80a57e54e7 — Plan 118.2 Ф.1: []T.@as_ptr() / @as_mut_ptr() FFI
    access methods. as_mut_ptr enforces mut-binding via
    builtin_mut_method registration (NEG E_PARAM_NOT_MUT).
  - 009bc3b92fc — Plan 118.1 Ф.1 V1: RawMem byte-level memory
    intrinsics. std/runtime/raw_mem.nv с пятью external fn:
    copy_from (memmove), copy_nonoverlapping (memcpy), fill (memset),
    write_bytes (Rust alias), compare (normalized -1/0/+1 memcmp).
    Pointer params via *u8 / *mut u8; size via usize. Каждая call site
    wraps в unsafe { } block per D216 §8.

Scope deliberately narrow — production-quality foundation rather than
full Plan 118.x closure. 9 fixtures end-to-end (parse → typecheck →
codegen → C compile → link → run → assert), all PASS под release
`nova test`:
  - plan118_1/t1_usize_isize_aliases_ok (5 sub-tests)
  - plan118_1/t2_rawmem_copy_from_ok (memmove + view subrange)
  - plan118_1/t3_rawmem_copy_nonoverlapping_ok (memcpy + zero-length)
  - plan118_1/t4_rawmem_fill_ok (pattern + zero-init + partial range)
  - plan118_1/t5_rawmem_write_bytes_ok (alias equivalence)
  - plan118_1/t6_rawmem_compare_ok (eq/lt/gt + zero-length)
  - plan118_1/t7_rawmem_copy_from_overlap_ok (forward overlap)
  - plan118_2/t1_as_ptr_basic_ok (4 sub-tests)
  - plan118_2/t1_neg_as_mut_ptr_on_ro_binding (NEG E_PARAM_NOT_MUT)

V1 scope shipped:
  - Typed pointer params `*u8` / `*mut u8` parse + map к C `const
    nova_byte*` / `nova_byte*` (parser already supported the syntax;
    external_registry needed usize→uint64_t plug to match call-site
    types).
  - RawMem unit-type namespace pattern (mirror `type Empty` / `Sentinel`
    из spec/02-types.md examples).
  - Overlap-safe memmove + UB-on-overlap memcpy distinction.
  - Normalized memcmp return (no implementation-defined non-zero).
  - usize/isize: TyCat::Int recognition + BUILTIN_TYPE_NAMES + C type
    mapping + apply_type_subst_to_ref + receiver detection. usize ABI
    matches C size_t on 64-bit. Spec D226 amended с formal D-block.

V1 out-of-scope (deferred to followups):
  - Typed (*T).read() / .write() instance methods — requires Plan 118
    Ф.4 auto-deref codegen.
  - Bulk copy via .copy_to[count] — requires size_of[T]() const fn.
  - Volatile reads/writes (Ф.2.1-2.5).
  - align_of[T]() / size_of[T]() compile-time const (Ф.2.3).
  - addr_of! / addr_of_mut! macros (Ф.3) — needs built-in macro
    framework.
  - CStr newtype + try_from / from_unchecked / from_view (Ф.4 refined
    design 2026-06-03) — file std/ffi/cstr.nv не landed.
  - cstr"..." literal token (Ф.4.1-4.6).
  - Cross-platform CI matrix, ABI snapshots, perf bench.
  - DebugPrintable protocol + ${p:?} format spec (Ф.7).

Key bugfix uncovered: ExternalRegistry's type_ref_to_c did not handle
usize/isize. Without it the external_registry-pass registered
RawMem.fill with param types containing fallback `Nova_usize*`,
которые не matched call-site arg types (`uint64_t`). Strict-matching
dispatch then picked the parser-pass registration с overload-mangled
c_name (`Nova_RawMem_static_fill__nova_byte_p_nova_byte_uint64_t`) →
undefined linker symbol. Fix: parallel addition of usize/isize к
external_registry::type_ref_to_c so both candidate signatures match
exactly; dispatch picks first (external_registry, unmangled name)
which matches the runtime symbol. Lesson: at multiple registration
sites C-type mapping must agree byte-for-byte, else strict overload
selection silently picks the WRONG c_name.

Plan 118 family НЕ closed:
  - Plan 118 typed-pointer foundation (Ф.1 parser/checker/codegen):
    parser supports `*T` syntax (verified); type-checker has TyPtr; но
    full deref `*p` / arrow `p->m` / arithmetic — не V1 scope.
  - Plan 118.1: V1 partial — byte-level only, typed-pointer-instance-
    method API остаётся открытой.
  - Plan 118.2: Ф.1 closed (as_ptr/as_mut_ptr); Ф.2 (MaybeUninit[T])
    deferred (generic record machinery deep work).
  - Plan 118.3: AtomicPtr[T] + cross-suspend pass — не trended yet.

Followup markers opened (see Plan 118.1 plan-doc Status section):
  [M-118.1-typed-pointer-instance-methods]
  [M-118.1-sizeof-intrinsic]
  [M-118.1-cstr-newtype]
  [M-118.1-unsafe-attr-on-external-fn]
  [M-118.1-volatile-ops]
  [M-118.1-addr-of-macros]
  [M-118.1-cstr-literal]
  [M-118.1-ffi-perf-bench]
  [M-118.1-typed-pointer-cookbook]
  [M-118-ftype-pointer-family]
  [M-118-npo-codegen]
  [M-118-debug-printable]

Status: 🟢 V1 LANDED, branch plan-118 ready для bidirectional sync с
main. V2 typed-pointer instance methods + CStr + volatile + addr_of!
макросы — отдельная multi-day work, gated на Plan 118 Ф.4 auto-deref
codegen и user demand priority (current FFI use-cases solvable через
RawMem byte-level + manual size arithmetic).

=== Plan 123.5.5 — Incremental LSP semantic-tokens delta (V5.5, 2026-06-03) ===

Followup [M-123.5-incremental-semantic-tokens] closure. V5.2 server
recomputed entire token-set каждый request; V5.5 adds protocol
`textDocument/semanticTokens/full/delta` для wire-efficient incremental
updates. Single-edit prefix-suffix algorithm + per-URI snapshot cache +
monotonic result_id.

Implementation (~430 LOC):
- nova-lsp/src/semantic_tokens_delta.rs (NEW, ~250 LOC):
  - SemanticTokensSnapshot struct
  - compute_semantic_token_edits — single-edit prefix-suffix
  - build_delta_response — decision-and-snapshot helper
  - 14 unit tests covering algorithm + decision
- nova-lsp/src/state.rs: semantic_tokens_cache + semantic_tokens_counter
  + next_semantic_tokens_result_id()
- nova-lsp/src/server.rs: capability Delta { delta: Some(true) } +
  semantic_tokens_full caches snapshot + NEW semantic_tokens_full_delta
  handler dispatches к build_delta_response.
- nova-lsp/src/lib.rs: module declaration.

Algorithm — single-edit prefix-suffix reduction:
  P = longest common prefix length (in tokens)
  S = longest common suffix length (bounded к non-overlap)
  emit one SemanticTokensEdit { start: P*5, delete_count:
    (old.len() - P - S) * 5, data: Some(new[P..new.len() - S]) }

Не minimum-edit (true LCS would split unrelated changes в N edits),
но wire-equivalent or better для typical localized LSP edits.
Indices гарантированно 5-aligned (каждый SemanticToken = 5 u32s).

Verification (release nova-lsp + cargo test --release):
- 14 V5.5 unit tests PASS (10 algorithm + 4 decision helper).
- Zero regressions: 115/115 LSP tests PASS (56 lib + 10 V5.5 +
  49 integration across 13 binaries).
- Positive coverage: identical, append, prepend, middle, total replace,
  empty old, empty new, modifier diff.
- Negative coverage: mismatched prev_id → fallback, no cached snapshot
  → fallback.

Spec: D217 amend V5.5 (~140 lines) — capability, protocol surface,
algorithm, state, decision helper, V5.5.1-V5.5.14 acceptance.

Plan doc: docs/plans/123.5.5-incremental-semantic-tokens.md.

Pattern lessons:
- Pure helper extraction (build_delta_response) — testable без async
  Backend/Client mock. State-update + response-construction live
  в one place, makes regression sweep cheap.
- LSP spec `data: Option<Vec<u32>>` deserialized as
  Option<Vec<SemanticToken>> by lsp-types — algorithm works в
  SemanticToken space, indices scale ×5 для wire format.
- Snapshot must be updated even на fallback path (stale id) —
  иначе client retries индефинитно с same stale id.

Followup markers:
- [M-123.5.5-lcs-multi-edit] — V5.5.1 true LCS multi-edit.
- [M-123.5.5-snapshot-eviction] — V5.5.2 LRU/size cap.

================================================================================
2026-06-03 — Plan 48.1: cross-module generic template registration ordering
================================================================================

Sub-plan под Plan 48 (mono pass). Trigger: при работе над Plan 91.13
(Ф.3 JSON conformance) обнаружен codegen-bug — cross-module
Option[HashMap[K,V]] return type signature имел `NovaOpt_nova_int`
(erased fallback), а body — `NovaOpt_Nova_HashMap_p` (mono'd) → CC-FAIL
type mismatch.

Root cause:
- `generic_type_templates` populated per-module из `module.items`
- Cross-module imports (HashMap из std/collections/hashmap.nv) НЕ были
  в templates во время forward-decl pass'a
- type_ref_to_c для inner generic fallback'ил в `Nova_HashMap*` (erased
  line ~4503)
- Option case checked is_concrete_type → false → returned NovaOpt_nova_int
- Body pass позже видел mono'd type (drain enqueued instance) → mismatch

Fix #1 (peer_files scan, ~30 строк в emit_module):
- Pre-populate generic_type_templates из peer_files
  (transitively-imported modules) ПОСЛЕ module.items pass, ДО
  forward-decl pass'a
- Same skip-list logic (Option/Result/protocols/newtypes)
- Insert с entry()/or_insert_with — module.items wins на коллизии

Fix #2 (forward typedef, ~15 строк в register_novaopt_decl):
- При registration NovaOpt typedef для pointer to mono'd struct
  (Nova_X____<args>*), emit forward `typedef struct Nova_X____ Nova_X____;`
  ДО NovaOpt typedef
- Без этого NovaOpt struct содержит field type ссылающийся на
  undeclared struct → C-compiler "unknown type name"
- Polluting check: только для mono'd names (contain "____" delim) с
  Nova_ prefix; skip primitives + runtime-defined

Regression test:
- nova_tests/plan48_1/option_hashmap_cross_module.nv — минимальный
  fixture с Option[HashMap[str, int]] cross-module use
- 1/0 PASS post-fix; CODEGEN-FAIL pre-fix (reproduces bug)

Test impact (full nova test):
- Baseline:  1865 PASS / 173 FAIL / 56 SKIP
- Post-fix:  1867 PASS / 172 FAIL / 56 SKIP
- Delta:     +2 PASS / -1 FAIL / 0 real regressions
- Diff:
  + concurrency/sleep_precision_bench (flaky recovery)
  + protocols/conversion/from_basic (flaky recovery)
  + plan103_3/mutex_mutual_exclusion_observed_interleave (flaky)
  - concurrency/mn_runtime_cross_channel (flaky timeout — env-flake)

Commits:
- e467e7707ab feat(plan48.1): cross-module generic template registration
- 353d1b70ec2 Merge plan-48.1 into main

Followups (post-MVP, не блокеры):

  refs из импортированных types (e.g. JsonValue references HashMap →
  auto-import HashMap транзитивно). Сейчас user должен ЯВНО import

=== Plan 123.7.4 — Incremental SCC cache (V7.4, 2026-06-03) ===

Followup [M-123.7-incremental-scc] closure. Финальный followup Plan 123
V*.3+ backlog'а — все четыре подплана закрыты в одной сессии.

V7.3 emits exact Tarjan SCC + reverse-topological propagation per
cache_module invocation (~1ms на typical module). Realistic workloads
(LSP rechecks, IDE batch passes, build-cache hits) repeatedly invoke
cache_module на identical modules → wasted work.

V7.4 adds process-level memoization: fingerprint входной граф,
restore cached propagated direct map по fingerprint hit. O(1) для
repeated identical inputs.

Implementation (~430 LOC):
- compiler-codegen/src/field_cache.rs:
  - ScCache struct (last_fingerprint, last_result, hits, misses)
  - WRITE_SET_SCC_CACHE + READ_SET_SCC_CACHE OnceLock<Mutex<ScCache>>
  - scc_cache_enabled / scc_cache_stats / reset_scc_caches public API
  - compute_scc_fingerprint — BTreeMap-canonical hash via DefaultHasher;
    sentinel-reserves 0 to disambiguate empty-cache vs empty-graph
  - propagate_via_scc_cached wrapper around V7.3 propagate_via_scc
  - Wired into build_write_set_registry + build_read_set_registry
  - 10 V7.4 unit tests (6 positive + 4 negative)

Opt-in via NOVA_FIELD_CACHE_SCC_CACHE=1 — default-off preserves V7.3
deterministic test contract. Two separate cache slots (write/read)
domain-separate fingerprint space — no collision risk.

Verification (release nova-cli + clang):
- field_cache::tests 47/47 PASS (10 V7.4 + 5 V7.3 + 32 baseline).
- nova_tests/plan123_7   1/1   PASS (default cfg).
- nova_tests/plan123_7_1 10/10 PASS (default cfg AND с cache enabled).
- nova_tests/plan123_7_2 2/2   PASS.

Spec: D223 amend V7.4 (~150 lines) — cache structure, fingerprint,
opt-in semantics, telemetry, V7.4.1-V7.4.10 acceptance.

Plan doc: docs/plans/123.7.4-incremental-scc.md.

🎯 Plan 123 V*.3+ backlog ПОЛНОСТЬЮ ЗАКРЫТ:
  V6.2.1 wallclock bench + V4.3 deep prefix + V5.5 incremental semtokens
  + V7.4 incremental SCC — 4 sub-plans, 1 session, ~1610 LOC delta.
  Только V8 cross-module IPA остался (DEFERRED INDEFINITELY).

Pattern lessons:
- Process-level OnceLock<Mutex<T>> для compiler memoization — clean
  без thread-local invasion. Compute outside lock минимизирует
  serialization серьёзных threads.
- Fingerprint via BTreeMap canonicalization защищает от HashMap
  iteration nondeterminism. DefaultHasher quality достаточен для
  false-collision probability ≪ 2⁻⁶³.
- Single-slot cache достаточен для hot LSP edit-loop scenario.
  Multi-slot LRU полезен для batch-compile (V7.4.1 followup).
- Test-isolation via static Mutex<()> + RAII env-var guard required
  когда tests share process state.

Followup markers:
- [M-123.7.4-lru-multi-slot] — V7.4.1 multi-slot LRU (~8 entries).
- [M-123.7.4-telemetry-json] — V7.4.2 nova check --telemetry-cache
  integration with hits/misses fields.
- [M-123.7.4-auto-enable] — V7.4.3 opportunistic auto-enable когда
  detected LSP runtime context.

Pre-existing bug exposed при testing (НЕ caused by V2.1):
- [M-124.8-value-record-mut-literal-codegen]: `mut t = ValueT { ... }`
  direct literal binding emits `Nova_T*` вместо `NovaValue_T`. Workaround
  via `ro` + constructor. Will need fix в emit_let_binding C-type
  resolution для value-record direct-literal RHS path.

Lessons:
- Cross-module state leak в ro_binding_names = textbook bug class —
  всегда тестировать checker passes с stdlib included (sha1/semver
  имеют `ro v = ...` boundaries).
- Block-scoped snapshot/restore = correct primitive для any per-block
  state tracking; pattern должен mirror scope snapshot.
- Shadow semantics: «всегда remove prior entry» = bulletproof; avoid
  «remove only if mut» branching.
- For codegen-affecting attributes (`#zero_on_move`): emit helper +
  defer auto-inject = safe incremental approach. V2 followup для full
  integration с consume call sites.
- Parser `parse_type_attrs` extensible через explicit tuple return —
  3rd boolean cleaner чем new TypeAttr variant для attributes which
  affect codegen integration (not literal coercion).

2026-06-03 (continued) — Plan 91.13 partial: str.from_codepoint(int) -> str
================================================================================

Sub-plan под Plan 91 (Ф.3 JSON conformance). Trigger — обнаружен stdlib
API gap при попытке написать JSON roundtrip conformance test после
Plan 48.1 closure.

Bug discovery:
- std/encoding/json.nv использует `str.from_codepoint(code)` в Unicode
  escape parsing (\uXXXX → codepoint → UTF-8 str)
- Функция НЕ объявлена в std/runtime/string.nv или char.nv
- D54 (Plan 34 Ф.5.2) запретил `int as char` direct cast — workaround
  через `char.try_from(n)?` adds Fail effect indirection
- JSON parser уже validates hex digits ⊆ [0, 0x10FFFF] — нужен прямой
  "known-valid" path без Fail unwrap

Fix:
- std/runtime/char.nv: `export external fn str.from_codepoint(cp int) -> str`
- compiler-codegen/src/codegen/runtime_registry.rs: RuntimeFn entry,
  c_name = "Nova_str_static_from_char" (alias) для backing
- compiler-codegen/nova_rt/string_builder.h: inline alias
  `Nova_str_static_from_codepoint(cp) → Nova_str_static_from_char(cp)`
  (так как codegen генерирует `Nova_<recv>_static_<name>` pattern,
  custom c_name in RuntimeFn не honored для этого path)

Semantics:
- Same UTF-8 encode impl как str.from(char) — Plan 04
- Invalid codepoint (< 0 или > 0x10FFFF) → empty str ("") silent
- Strict variant (str.try_from_codepoint -> Result[str, ...]) — followup
  [M-91.13-strict-from_codepoint]

Tests (release nova binary):
- nova_tests/plan91_13/from_codepoint_test.nv — 4 positive cases:
  ASCII (65 → "A"), BMP (0x041F → "П"), supplementary (0x1F600 → "😀"),
  NUL (0 → str.len == 1)
- nova_tests/plan91_13/from_codepoint_invalid_neg.nv — 4 negative cases:
  negative -1, above 0x110000, max int, min int → all empty str

Targeted regression check: plan48_1 (2/0), plan90_1 (20/0), plan73
(25/0), plan77 (7/0), plan91_8a_2 (27/0) — 0 regressions.

Plan 91.13 partial closed. Full closure blocked on
[M-91.13-if-expr-divergence-aware-inference] — divergence-aware if-expr
type inference для `if cond { throw } else { str_value }` pattern.
Previous attempt (block_diverges check in emit_if_expr) revert'нут
из-за 24 regressions в Plan 108 binding rules + concurrency tests.
Нужен targeted approach (whitelist of divergent patterns), not blanket
check.

Acceptance criteria (V1):
- [✓] str.from_codepoint(65) == "A" (ASCII)
- [✓] str.from_codepoint(0x041F) == "П" (BMP)
- [✓] str.from_codepoint(0x1F600) == "😀" (supplementary)
- [✓] str.from_codepoint(0) с len = 1 (NUL)
- [✓] str.from_codepoint(invalid) == "" (4 negative cases)
- [✓] 0 regressions на targeted suites

Plan 91 Ф.3 (JSON conformance) status: BLOCKED на Ф.2 divergence fix.
After that lands, plan91_13/json_roundtrip_*.nv suite будет добавлен.

2026-06-03 (вечер) — Plan 118 Ф.4 V1: typed pointer read/write landed

Worktree nova-p118 / branch plan-118. Two new commits на top
foundational V1 chain:
  - 36b2a303ee0 — feat(plan118 Ф.4 V1): typed pointer (*ro T).read() +
    (*mut T).write(v) — codegen + 4 fixtures
  - ebad5690f29 — docs+spec(plan118 Ф.4 V1): plan-doc closure entry +
    D216 §11a amend

Scope: primitive-T typed pointer instance methods на typed pointer
family (`*T` / `*ro T` / `*mut T` / `*unsafe T`). Closes high-priority
followup [M-118.1-typed-pointer-instance-methods] для primitive T scope.

Codegen wiring (emit_c.rs ~54 lines added):
1. Method-call dispatch — detect `obj_ty` ends в `*` AND not известный
   Nova typedef (Nova_*/NovaArray_*/NovaOpt_*/NovaRes_*/NovaBox_*/
   NovaValue_*/void*/nova_ptr). `read` → `(*p)`; `write` → comma-op
   `((*p)=v, NOVA_UNIT)`.
2. Return-type inference parallel detection — `read` returns pointee
   (strip `const ` + `*`); `write` returns `nova_unit`.

is_const derived от const-prefix; write() falls through на *ro T,
emits generic "method not found" (typed E_PTR_WRITE_ON_RO_TARGET
deferred — [M-118.4-typed-ro-write-error]).

Tests (4 fixtures, all PASS под release nova test):
  - plan118_4/t1_ptr_read_ok        — *ro u8 / i32 / i64 read
  - plan118_4/t2_ptr_write_ok       — *mut u8 / i32 / i64 write
  - plan118_4/t3_neg_write_on_ro_ptr — write на *ro u8 rejected
  - plan118_4/t4_ptr_roundtrip_ok   — write→read + RawMem.fill compose

V2 followups opened:
  - [M-118.4-struct-ptr-read]      — struct T deref (deep copy + own.)
  - [M-118.4-typed-ro-write-error] — typed diagnostic
  - [M-118-ptr-arithmetic]         — p.add(n) / p.offset(n)

Acceptance criteria (V1, scope-limited):
  ✅ A-118.4-V1.a — (*ro T).read() returns pointee value
  ✅ A-118.4-V1.b — (*mut T).write(v T) stores в pointee
  ✅ A-118.4-V1.c — .write() на *ro T rejected
  ✅ A-118.4-V1.d — Roundtrip write→read recovers value
  ✅ A-118.4-V1.e — Composes с RawMem byte-level operations
  ✅ A-118.4-V1.f — No regressions in Plan 118.1 / 118.2 (9/9 prior PASS)

Combined Plan 118 V1 surface (after Ф.4 V1):

    (Plan 118.1 Ф.1)

(libpng pixel buffers, libcurl recv buffers, sqlite blobs с typed

== 2026-06-03 — Plan 110.9 V1.1 continuation: M-110.9.1 typed throw codegen closed

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p114-4
> Branch: plan-110.9-final-closure (off main 5f61fde102e + later commits)

Закрыл 4-й из 5 V1.1 markers: M-110.9.1 typed CleanupTimeoutError throw.

Подход:
- Two splice markers в emit_c.rs:emit_main_wrapper:
  /*__CLEANUP_TIMEOUT_IMPL__*/  перед int main() body site
  /*__CLEANUP_TIMEOUT_INIT__*/  в main() body после effects registration
- Unconditional register_type_id("CleanupTimeoutError") в finalize ensures
  NOVA_TID_USER_CleanupTimeoutError macro defined. Without it impl
  references undefined macro.
- Static fn _nova_throw_cleanup_timeout_impl allocates Nova_CleanupTimeoutError,
  sets duration_ms, snprintf'ит msg, вызывает nova_throw_typed.
- Cost: ~30 bytes binary if unused (acceptable trade-off для всегда-typed
  throw path).

Runtime: nv_shield_check_deadline branch на typed impl IF fn pointer set
(теперь always set). String fallback retained для defensive.

Tests: 1 POS fixture typed_cleanup_timeout_v1_1.nv (compile-success
verifies splice fires correctly). Codegen output verified via grep —
NOVA_TID_USER_CleanupTimeoutError macro defined, static impl emitted,
fn pointer assigned в main body.

41/41 plan110 PASS на release nova-cli (was 40 before; +1 new POS).

NovaFinalizerStack runtime + per-with Application block prologue/epilogue
+ register/fire dispatch + normal/throw path integration) exceeded

Lessons:
- Two-marker splice pattern в emit_c.rs (one для impl, one для init)
  cleanly handles forward-reference issues (impl needs user type struct,
  init needs effects/runtime registration done).
- Unconditional type_id registration acceptable trade-off для prelude
  types used by runtime infrastructure — ~30 byte binary cost beats
  conditional emission complexity + risk.

=== Plan 123.1.1 — Multi-region mut cache (V1.1, 2026-06-03) ===

Followup [M-123.1-mut-region-recache] closure — last open V1 followup в
Plan 123 family. Расширяет V1 first-region-only mut-кеширование к
multi-region: body's top-level stmts split на barrier boundaries (write
OR call), каждая region с reads ≥ threshold получает own cache local.

Algorithm: find_mut_regions_with_ipa(body, fname, ipa, span) returns
Vec<MutRegion { start, end, reads, first_span, trailing_included }>.
cache_fn_with_ipa iterates regions, keeps reads ≥ threshold, allocates
MutRegionTarget per region. First region per field keeps name
`_at_<F>` (V1 backward-compat); subsequent regions use `_at_<F>_r<N>`
(N starts at 1).

Rewrite: per-region read rewrite + per-region let insertion. Non-prefix
groups (start > 0) processed в descending-start order so insertion
preserves untouched indices. Prefix bucket (ro fields + first-region
mut) prepended together.

Implementation (~430 LOC):
- compiler-codegen/src/field_cache.rs:
  - MutRegion struct NEW (~25 LOC)
  - MutRegionTarget struct NEW (~15 LOC)
  - find_mut_regions_with_ipa helper NEW (~80 LOC)
  - stmt_span helper NEW (~20 LOC)
  - cache_fn_with_ipa modified — per-region target allocation (~60 LOC)
  - rewrite_fn_body_split_with_ipa modified — per-region rewrite +
    multi-position let insertion (~80 LOC)
  - build_at_field_let helper NEW (~15 LOC)
  - analyze_fn_for_explain modified — scan ALL top-level _at_* lets (~5 LOC)
  - 8 unit tests v1_1_* (~250 LOC)
- nova_tests/plan123_1_1/ — 3 runtime fixtures:
  - v1_1_two_regions_write_ok.nv (positive 2-region split by write)
  - v1_1_three_regions_mixed_ok.nv (positive 3-region mixed barriers)
  - v1_1_single_read_region_no_cache_ok.nv (negative — partial coverage)

Verification (release nova-cli + clang):
- 8 V1.1 unit tests PASS
- 3 runtime fixtures PASS via `nova test nova_tests/plan123_1_1`
- Zero regressions:
  - field_cache lib 55/55 PASS (47 baseline + 8 V1.1)
  - plan123_1 18/18 PASS
  - plan123_2 14/14 PASS
  - plan123_4 10/10 PASS

Spec: D217 amend V1.1 (~180 lines) — motivation, algorithm, per-region
naming, rewrite phases, ExplainReport compatibility, codegen impact,
V1.1.1-V1.1.8 acceptance.

Plan doc: docs/plans/123.1.1-mut-multi-region.md.

Real-world impact: closes mut-region-recache gap для Counter-style
mutating methods. Не closes WriteBuffer.@write_char chain pattern —
тот случай связан с codegen chain expansion (@buf.push().push() lowering
emits nova_self->buf per chained call); требует V7.5 callee-non-self-
mutation IPA — отдельный followup.

Pattern lessons:
- Per-region target list cleaner than recursive AST mutation —
  decouple analysis (regions) от rewrite (per-region read + let-injection).
- Descending-order multi-position insertion keeps remaining indices
  valid без re-indexing pass.
- IPA-aware barrier detection (V7.1) уже handles real-call vs
  non-mutating-call distinction — V1.1 inherits gratis.
- analyze_fn_for_explain "scan all top-level" rule generalizes
  cleanly от V1's "prefix run" approach без changing per-let semantics.

Followup markers:
- [M-123.1.1-nested-regions] — V1.2 nested barrier analysis в
  if/while/match-arm bodies.
- [M-123.1.1-callee-non-self-mutation-ipa] — V7.5 fluent-builder IPA
  для []T.push(self mut) non-invalidation recognition.

🎯 Plan 123 V1 family — все markers closed.

== 2026-06-03 — Plan 110.9 V1.1 COMPLETE — M-110.9.3 register_finalizer LIFO closed
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p114-4
> Branch: plan-110.9.3-register-finalizer-lifo (off main f6c538140f1)

Финальный 5-й V1.1 marker закрыт. Plan 110.9 теперь ✅ COMPLETE.

Three-layer integration:

1. Runtime (effects.h + effects.c):
   - NovaFinalizer struct: {void* fn, void* env, struct NovaFinalizer* prev}
   - NovaFinalizerStack struct: {NovaFinalizer* top}
   - _nova_active_finalizer_stack TLS pointer
   - nova_finalizer_push(stack, fn, env) — push к stack head
   - nova_finalizer_fire_lifo(stack) — drain stack, call closures с env

2. Codegen (emit_c.rs::emit_with):
   - Detect Application binding via TypeRef::Named last-segment
   - Prologue: NovaFinalizerStack local var + save prev TLS + install new
   - Epilogue (runs after handler restore, both paths): fire LIFO + restore

3. Method dispatch (emit_c.rs::emit_effect_type):
   - Intercept Application.register_finalizer — extract NovaClosBase
     {fn, env} pair from arg, push к runtime stack directly.
   - V1 design: handler's register_finalizer body ignored (runtime-managed
     LIFO); per-handler observer logic moves к Cleanup effect (Plan 110.4.4).

D195 R1+R2+R8 semantics integrated:
- R1 inner handler wins via per-block stack.
- R2 finalizer registry NOT inherited via TLS swap discipline.
- R8 abort/SIGKILL bypasses runtime path (OS-level).

Tests: 1 POS fixture (register_finalizer_lifo_v1_1) — compile-success +
codegen output verified (nova_finalizer_push в dispatcher, init+fire+
restore wrapper around with-block). 41/41 plan110 PASS на release nova-cli.

🎯 Plan 110.9 V1.1 final state:
- ✅ M-110.9.1 typed CleanupTimeoutError throw codegen (1377c611a57).
- ✅ M-110.9.2 WithExitTimeout Level 1 (8ff8dda820b).
- ✅ M-110.9.3 register_finalizer LIFO runtime (86028e74aac — этот session).
- ✅ M-110.9.4 W_FFI_CANCEL_UNSAFE lint (35afc6565e9).
- ✅ M-110.9.5 on_exit strict signature (d2daf4b768e).

5/5 markers закрыто. Plan 110.9 = ✅ COMPLETE.
Plan 110 family: umbrella + 110.1-110.8 + 110.9 = 9 sub-plans все закрыты.

Lessons:
- Three-layer integration pattern (runtime helpers + codegen prologue/epilogue
  + method-dispatch intercept) — proven scalable для effect-with-runtime-state
  patterns (Application LIFO, потенциально Cleanup observer scoping, etc).
- NovaClosBase closure-form storage critical — Nova fn-types wrapped в
  closure base struct, NOT raw fn pointers. Runtime helpers must handle
  this (initial naive design treated fn arg as raw void(*)(void) — crashed
  при first push).
- Per-handler-vs-runtime trade-off: V1 design bypasses handler's
  register_finalizer impl entirely. Rationale: deterministic LIFO firing
  matters more than per-handler customization. Observability moves к
  Cleanup effect on_scope_enter/_exit (Plan 110.4.4) where customization
  semantically belongs.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
2026-06-04 — D216 V2 amend + Plan 118.5 NEW (right-binding rule
formalization + unsafe T first-class)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Spec design landed (commit b10317dfb76, branch main):
- D216 V2 amend §V2.1-§V2.7 (spec/decisions/02-types.md)
- Plan 118.5 sub-plan doc (docs/plans/118.5-right-binding-rule-migration.md)

### Что зафиксировано

Universal right-binding rule: каждый type-level modifier (ro/mut/unsafe/
consume) применяется ко ВСЕМУ что справа до конца type-expression либо
до следующего modifier. Парсер для `ro` уже это делает (verified в
parse_type recursive arm). `mut` / `unsafe` / `consume` нужны parallel
TypeRef wrappers + parser arms.

Pointer family syntax migrates с inline-modifier (`*ro T` / `*mut T` /
`*unsafe T`) к prefix form (`ro * T` / `mut * T` / `unsafe * T`).
`*` остаётся pure constructor без inline modifier.

Дополнительно `unsafe T` first-class — MaybeUninit-style semantic:
init/layout/aliasing/identity contracts off; read requires unsafe { } wrap
(E_UNSAFE_T_READ_REQUIRES_WRAP); write safe (transitions к valid).

Two orthogonal safety оси:
  ro * T              — readonly ptr к valid T (canonical safe)
  mut * T             — mut ptr к valid T
  unsafe * T          — possibly-null/dangling ptr к valid T (Rust *const T)
  * unsafe T          — valid ptr к possibly-uninit T (Rust *mut MaybeUninit<T>)
  unsafe * unsafe T   — both unsafe (worst case)

NPO recalculation §V2.4: `unsafe *T` excluded (null может быть valid value);
`* unsafe T` включён (pointer still non-null).

### Зачем breaking change сейчас

Inconsistency обнаружена 2026-06-04 при design discussion:
- Parser применяет right-binding для `ro` (recursive parse_type → Readonly)
- Pointer family использует inline-modifier (специальный case)
- Users intuit'ивно ожидают единое правило
- `mut * T` / `unsafe * T` parse error в current parser
- `* unsafe T` (valid ptr к uninit T) — невозможно express

Migration cost линейно с FFI footprint. Audit grep: 54 occurrences across
14 nova_tests files + std/runtime/raw_mem.nv + 1 example. Manageable.

### Migration plan (Plan 118.5)

7 фаз ~1-2 dev-day total:
  Ф.0 GATE — design freeze + audit
  Ф.1 AST — TypeRef::Mut + TypeRef::Unsafe + Pointer без modifier field
  Ф.2 Parser — recursive arms для mut/unsafe + legacy detection
  Ф.3 Codegen — wrappers transparent для C
  Ф.4 Type-checker — unsafe T semantic enforcement
  Ф.5 Sweep — rewrite 54 occurrences
  Ф.6 Closure — D33/D216/D217/D218 amends + meta-logs

Grace period: legacy `*ro T` / `*mut T` emit W_DEPRECATED warning;
legacy `*unsafe T` emit W_BREAKING_UNSAFE_PTR_MEANING (semantic shift).
Errors after one release cycle.

### Followup markers opened

- [M-118.5-right-binding-migration]      — overall impl tracking
- [M-118.5-unsafe-t-readwrite-semantics] — checker E_UNSAFE_T_READ_REQUIRES_WRAP
- [M-118.5-mut-t-vs-binding-distinction] — disambiguate `mut T` vs `mut x T`
- [M-118.5-consume-as-type-modifier]     — generalize consume
- [M-118.5-d218-maybeuninit-duplication] — review redundancy с D218 MaybeUninit
- [M-118.5-npo-recalculation]            — NPO codegen extension

### Lessons / design rationale

1. **Inconsistency спрятавшаяся за convenience.** Parser had right-binding
   для `ro` long-time; pointer-modifier kept inline form (possibly из-за
   "C-imported notation" instinct). Single rule cleaner для users.

2. **Breaking change cost vs ergonomics gain.** ~54 occurrences manageable;
   future FFI surface will grow it. Fix now < fix later.

3. **`unsafe T` first-class subsumes MaybeUninit<T>.** Plan 118.2 D218
   может стать redundant. Tracked в [M-118.5-d218-maybeuninit-duplication].

4. **Two safety оси orthogonal** — pointer-validity (null/dangling) vs
   pointee-validity (init/aligned). Combinations cover real FFI/embedded
   patterns previously requiring conventions.

5. **Rust precedent confirmed.** `NonNull<T>`/`&T` ↔ Nova `ro * T`/`mut * T`.
   `*const T`/`*mut T` ↔ Nova `unsafe * T`. `MaybeUninit<T>` ↔ Nova `unsafe T`.
   Direct parallel — Nova syntax more uniform.

🆕 PLANNED — 7 phases queued. Existing Plan 118 V1 / Plan 118.4 V1 code не
affected (use bare `*T` без inline modifier — already V2-compliant). RawMem
stdlib signatures будут migrated в Plan 118.5 Ф.5 sweep.

    field)

  - PointerModifier enum retained для Ty::TypedPtr runtime tag (decoupled)
  - 4 new helpers: strip_modifiers, is_mut, is_unsafe,
    outer_unsafe_before_pointer (NPO support)

Parser (compiler-codegen/src/parser/mod.rs):
  - NEW KwMut arm — `mut T` → Mut(inner) recursive parse
  - NEW KwUnsafe arm — `unsafe T` → Unsafe(inner) recursive parse
  - Star branch — pure pointer constructor (removed inline-modifier detection)
  - Parser.warnings infrastructure (currently unused но plumbed для future)

Codegen propagation (21 sites across 8 files):
  - emit_c.rs / external_registry.rs — type_ref_to_c with Mut/Unsafe transparent
  - doc/collector.rs + render_json.rs — display + JSON output
  - types/mod.rs — 11 sites including ty_of_ref SEMANTIC COLLAPSE point
  - lints.rs — 3 sites
  - All Mut/Unsafe wrappers transparent at C level (no ABI change)

Type-checker (compiler-codegen/src/types/mod.rs):
  - UnsafeCtx.unsafe_t_vars scope-stack parallel к ptr_vars
  - walk_block push/pop frames lockstep
  - Stmt::Let registration via outer_unsafe_before_pointer detection
  - ExprKind::Ident emits E_UNSAFE_T_READ_REQUIRES_WRAP outside unsafe block
  - Fn params registration at fn entry

Migration (Ф.5):
  - std/runtime/raw_mem.nv — 5 sigs migrated к `mut * u8` canonical
  - t1_neg_duplicate_modifier deleted (concept doesn't exist under V2)
  - t1_9_chain_modifiers_ok NEW POS replacing obsolete NEG
  - examples/typed_pointers/basic_pointer.nv — all 4 forms canonical

### CRITICAL design correction после user feedback

Initial implementation incorrectly framed `*ro T` / `*mut T` / `*unsafe T`
as «legacy syntax» needing deprecation warning. User correctly identified
that under V2 right-binding rule these ARE valid V2 syntax (just produce
different AST shape than rev-1):
  - rev-1 `*mut T`  = Readonly(Pointer(T)) («mut ptr к T»)
  - V2   `*mut T`   = Pointer(Mut(T))      («ptr к mut T»)
Both compile, both produce same C ABI (T*), but semantically different
intent. Removed false deprecation detection + warnings entirely. Rev-1
code that wrote `*mut T` expecting «mut ptr к T» now silently produces
different AST shape — Ф.5 migration sweep explicitly rewrites such code
к preserve original intent (`*mut T` → `mut * T`).

  - plan118 (umbrella): 38/38 PASS
  - plan118_1 (RawMem): 7/7 PASS (ABI-clean migration)

### Lessons learned

1. **User feedback can correct design framing mid-implementation.** Initial
   "legacy syntax" framing для `*ro T` was wrong; correction yielded
   cleaner implementation (no warnings infrastructure burden, simpler parser).

2. **Workflow parallelization is powerful для mechanical work.** 7 agents
   fixing 21 codegen sites simultaneously took ~3.5 min vs ~30 min
   sequential. Caveat: agents reported "sites in OTHER files" outside
   their assigned scope — final cargo check used к verify all sites
   actually covered.

3. **AST variant arity changes cascade massively.** 22 pattern matches
   broke when Pointer went от 3-tuple к 2-tuple. cargo check enumerates
   them all — easy fix.

4. **Semantic collapse point (ty_of_ref) is THE key infrastructure call.**
   AST wrappers (Mut/Unsafe) lose information when converted к Ty —
   accepted asymmetry. Semantic enforcement happens at TypeRef walk level,
   not Ty level.

## 2026-06-04 (autonomous V3 implementation) — Plan 118.5 V3 LANDED

Plan 118.5 V3 (D216 V3 amend §V3.1-§V3.7) implements 4 design rules
unblocked после ~10-round design discussion. User explicit directive:
«работать по плану изолировано без остановок по всем оставшимся пунктам
без упрощений (как для прода)».

V3 rules (4 design constraints):

1. **§V3.1 — storage-class-aware ro+mut ban.** `ro mut T` / `mut ro T`
   illegal when T is value type (primitives `int`/`uint`/`isize`/`usize`/
   `i8..u64`/`f32`/`f64`/`bool`/`char`/`byte`/`str`/`ptr`, value records,
   named tuples, anonymous tuples, `()`); allowed when T is reference
   type (heap record, array, pointer, func, protocol) — outer modifier
   binds the binding (ro = readonly slot), inner mut applies к pointee
   data. New error: `E_MUTABILITY_CONFLICT_VALUE_TYPE`. Implementation:
   `compiler-codegen/src/types/mod.rs::check_v3_ro_mut_conflict` recursive
   walker hooked into `check_module` after type_check_ctx pass.

2. **§V3.2 — modifier ordering (safety-outer / mutability-inner).**
   `mut unsafe T` / `ro unsafe T` illegal — safety modifier (`unsafe`)
   must wrap mutability modifier (`ro`/`mut`), reverse forbidden;
   equivalent transitively: `mut * unsafe T` / `ro * unsafe T` каскад.
   New error: `E_MODIFIER_ORDER`. Implementation: parser KwRo/KwMut arms
   consult `inner.contains_unsafe_in_chain()` after recursive parse.

3. **§V3.3 — right-binding propagation semantics.** Outer modifier
   semantically applies к ALL nested types of same class up к next
   same-class boundary OR `safe` stopper OR explicit different-class
   modifier. `unsafe * T` → `.read()` returns `unsafe T` (outer unsafe
   propagates через Pointer к pointee value level).

4. **§V3.4 — `safe` keyword + extended E_REDUNDANT_TYPE_MODIFIER.**
   New keyword `safe` (lexer + parser token) — behavior-only propagation
   stopper. Transparent at AST (parser tracks via `safe_stoppers:
   Vec<Span>` field). Same-class repetition в chain (`ro * ro T` /
   `mut * mut T` / `unsafe * unsafe T`) now fires `E_REDUNDANT_TYPE_
   MODIFIER` (V2 covered binding-level only). Escape hatch: `ro * safe
   ro T` allowed (safe broke propagation, inner ro is fresh layer).

Implementation phases (5 commits):
- Ф.0 — spec D216 V3 amend §V3.1-§V3.7 + plan-doc V3 section + 8 V3
  acceptance criteria (A-118.5-V3.a..h)
- Ф.1 — `safe` keyword lexer + parser arm + safe_stoppers tracking +
  5 fixtures POS
- Ф.2 — storage-class detection helper + check_v3_ro_mut_conflict +
  4 fixtures (3 NEG + 1 POS ref-type)
- Ф.3 — modifier order check (KwRo/KwMut + unsafe propagation through
  .read()) + 5 fixtures (3 NEG + 2 POS) + safe-stopper escape
- Ф.4 — E_REDUNDANT_TYPE_MODIFIER extends к type-level chains +
  contains_same_class_in_chain helper + safe escape hatch + 5 fixtures
  (3 NEG + 2 POS) — commit 85f81aad959

User clarifications (verbatim, applied):
- `str`, `ptr` — value type (despite str being heap-backed internally —
  modifier semantics treat str as scalar value-of-pointer)
- named tuples — value type (Plan 120 `type Point(x f64, y f64)`)
- anonymous tuples `(A, B, C)` — value type
- `int` alias `isize` / `uint` alias `usize` — both forms recognized
  identically by V3 storage-class check

Migration (low impact per §V3.6 audit):
- `nova_tests/plan118_5/t4_neg_unsafe_arg_to_safe_param.nv` — `fn safe`
  → `fn accept_safe` (safe is now reserved keyword)
- `nova_tests/plan118/t1_9_chain_modifiers_ok.nv` — V2 chains rewritten
  к V3-compliant forms
- `nova_tests/plan118/t1_3_chain_multi_level_ok.nv` — triple chain
  `*mut *ro *mut Node` → `*mut *ro Node` (V3 propagation rule applies
  outer mut uniformly)
- stdlib `std/runtime/raw_mem.nv` — UNCHANGED (V3-compliant)

Test results:
- plan118_5_v3: 15/15 PASS (5 fixtures per Ф.1, Ф.2, Ф.3, Ф.4)
- plan118: 38/38 PASS (with t1_3 migration)
- plan118_1: 11/11 PASS
- plan118_5: 14/14 PASS

Followups closed: [M-118.5-V3-safe-keyword-impl], [M-118.5-V3-ro-mut-
storage-class], [M-118.5-V3-modifier-order], [M-118.5-V3-redundant-
extension].

Followups deferred: [M-118.5-V3-binding-context-relaxation] — V4 work
to relax §V3.1 for binding-context ref-T (currently strict — value-type
T always errors regardless of context; future work may allow binding-
context override).

### State

(без упрощений). All 4 [M-118.5-V3-*] implementation followups closed.

=== Plan 123.1.2 — Nested-region mut cache (V1.2, 2026-06-04) ===

Followup [M-123.1.1-nested-regions] closure. Расширяет V1.1 multi-region
mut caching к **nested** blocks: recursively descends into if/while/
match/for/loop bodies, applies per-block region analysis, allocates
unique `_at_<F>_n<N>` cache locals для qualifying nested regions.

Algorithm: bottom-up — process nested children FIRST (Phase A), then
process current block (Phase B). Bottom-up prevents outer-rewriter
double-rewrite по уже-inserted nested lets.

Implementation (~600 LOC):
- compiler-codegen/src/field_cache.rs:

    find_mut_regions_in_block(&Block, ...) (block-level extraction)

    exhaustive ExprKind walk skipping closures)

  plan123_1_1 3/3 + plan123_2 14/14 + plan123_4 10/10 PASS

exploration (workflow w5dlb8t9w) подтвердил architectural insight —
V7.5 (callee-non-self-mutation IPA) **НЕ** fixes WriteBuffer.
@write_char chain pattern, contrary to earlier doc claims. Root cause
= codegen recursive emit_expr(obj) propagation в emit_c.rs:19567
(single AST @buf read multiplied by 3 chained pushes через string-
substitution). Spawned NEW marker [M-123.4.4-codegen-fluent-chain-
root-temp] для codegen-level fix.

- [M-123.4.4-codegen-fluent-chain-root-temp] — codegen chain-root
  temp для WriteBuffer / StringBuilder / []T fluent chain patterns

Pattern lessons:
- Bottom-up recursion safe для nested rewrites — inner lets land
  before outer rewriter descends, no double-rewrite.
- Sequential seq counter ensures global uniqueness без per-field
  region_idx scheme — simpler than V1.1.
- AST walker exhaustiveness critical — workflow agent enumerated
  все 23+ ExprKind variants requiring descent.

=== Plan 123.7.5 — Callee-non-self-mutation IPA (V7.5, 2026-06-04) ===

Followup [M-123.1.1-callee-non-self-mutation-ipa] closure. Refines V7.1
IPA barrier detection: `@F.method()` calls do NOT invalidate SIBLING
field caches (fname != F). Conservative for own-field (fname == F)
без TypeDecl ref/value distinction.

Algorithm (~12 LOC helper + ~10 LOC dispatch refinement):

  call_recv_self_field(obj) -> Option<&str>:
    matches obj.kind == Member{obj: SelfAccess, name: F} → Some("F")
    else None

  expr_contains_invalidating_call_for refined:
    if obj is SelfAccess → V7.1 (direct @method())
    elif call_recv_self_field(obj) == Some(recv_field):
      if fname == recv_field → conservative invalidate
      else → V7.5 sibling-safe (false)
    else → conservative invalidate (var.method() / chain receiver)

Implementation (~250 LOC):
- compiler-codegen/src/field_cache.rs:
  - call_recv_self_field NEW (~12 LOC)
  - expr_contains_invalidating_call_for refined (~10 LOC delta)
  - Docstring updates documenting V7.5 scope (~30 LOC)
  - 6 unit tests v7_5_* (~180 LOC)
- nova_tests/plan123_7_5/ — 3 runtime fixtures:
  - v7_5_sibling_survives_field_method_ok.nv (positive sibling)
  - v7_5_multiple_siblings_ok.nv (positive multi-sibling)
  - v7_5_var_method_invalidates_neg_ok.nv (negative var-method)

Verification (release nova-cli + clang):
- 6 V7.5 unit tests PASS
- 3 runtime fixtures PASS via nova test
- Zero regressions:
  - field_cache lib 70/70 PASS (64 baseline + 6 V7.5)
  - plan123_1 18/18 + plan123_1_1 3/3 + plan123_1_2 5/5 +
    plan123_2 14/14 + plan123_4 10/10 + plan123_7 1/1 +
    plan123_7_1 10/10 + plan123_7_2 2/2 PASS

Spec: D223 amend V7.5 (~140 lines) — V7.5.1-V7.5.6 acceptance.
Plan doc: docs/plans/123.7.5-callee-non-self-ipa.md.

Important scope corrections в docs:
- V7.5 does NOT close WriteBuffer.@write_char chain pattern
  (3× nova_self->buf). Root cause = codegen recursive emit_expr(obj)
  in emit_c.rs:19567. Separate marker [M-123.4.4-codegen-fluent-
  chain-root-temp] spawned для actual fix.
- V7.5 IS valuable for sibling-field cache survival — confirmed by
  workflow w5dlb8t9w root_cause analysis.

Followup markers spawned:
- [M-123.7.5-same-field-ref-type] — V7.6 same-field refinement
  using reference-type semantics (TypeDecl integration).
- [M-123.7.5-chain-receiver] — V7.7 chain receiver extension.

Pattern lessons:
- Helper functions с clean Option return type compose well —
  call_recv_self_field is reusable elsewhere если same pattern
  needed.

  sibling-field-only, avoids TypeDecl complexity. Future V7.6+
  can extend.
- Test ordering: V7.5 tests follow V1.2 tests (which follow V1.1).
  Each V*-series in field_cache::tests reads as a story.

2026-06-05 — Plan 125 PROPOSED: divergence-aware result-type inference
================================================================================

Plan-doc для extraction `[M-91.13-if-expr-divergence-aware-inference]` из
followup Plan 91.13 в отдельный top-level plan. Trigger — user feedback:
"вопрос шире" + расширение семантики `never` bottom-type.

Discovery (Workflow с 6 parallel audit agents + 1 synthesis):

Spec обещает полную семантику bottom-type (08-runtime.md:1008-1025 +
D25 в 04-effects.md): subtype любого T, тип throw / return / panic /
exit / loop / interrupt. Компилятор имплементирует ТОЛЬКО часть:
- Ty::Never declared at types/mod.rs:24
- Производится только при resolve type-ref `-> never` в сигнатуре
  (ty_of_ref, единственный construction site)
- infer_expr_type НЕ имеет cases для Throw/Interrupt/Return — fall to None
- assignable нет правила `never <: T` — TyCat::Other silently
  short-circuit'ит type-check (escape hatch, скрывает gap)
- Helper infrastructure expr_diverges / block_diverges (types/mod.rs:10387)
  ЕСТЬ — используется handler-body must-diverge (D61) + consume-flow
  merge — НЕ для join-type инференса

Существующие тесты passing'ят НЕ потому что never <: T, а потому что
TyCat::Other silently пропускает type-check.

Prior attempt 24 регрессии (2026-06-03 revert):
- 5 plan108 readonly (silent codegen drift, ловится CC-test)
- 8 plan83_12 tcp/udp (NET TIMEOUTs — silent runtime UB)
- 7 concurrency (detach/sleep/select/time/mn_runtime)
- 4 разное (effects/types/protocols/plan34/plan97)
Root cause: переиспользование block_diverges из types/mod.rs, которое
считает Stmt::Return/Stmt::Throw в body. flip'ало
`if early-cond { return X } else { compute() }` идиому везде по stdlib.

Plan 125 структура (7 фаз, ~36-53h total):
- Ф.0: Discovery + baseline + diagnostic env-var NOVA_DEBUG_IF_INFER
- Ф.1: Whitelist V1 — trailing-only throw (один паттерн)
- Ф.2: + trailing panic / exit (prelude calls)
- Ф.3: + interrupt + user fn -> never call
- Ф.4: Recursive composition (nested if/match in trailing)
- Ф.5: Type-checker side (Ty::Never first-class) — опционально
- Ф.6: Closure (spec amendment + docs + 5 followup markers)

Acceptance criteria (12):
- Plan 91 Ф.3 unblocked (JSON conformance)
- Zero regression vs baseline после КАЖДОЙ фазы
- Все 24 регрессионных файла прошлой попытки PASS

- ≥15 positive + ≥8 negative fixtures

Critical risks (8) с mitigations + 6 prior-attempt lessons:

=== Plan 123.4.4 — Codegen fluent-chain root-temp pre-pass (2026-06-04) ===

Final sub-plan of umbrella 123-followups-2026-06-04. Closes
[M-123.4.4-codegen-fluent-chain-root-temp] — the marker that started
the whole 5-sub-plan investigation.

**The fix that actually closes WriteBuffer.@write_char triple-load:**

Source `@buf.push(a).push(b).push(c)` has only 1 AST `Member{SelfAccess,
buf}` leaf. But emit_c.rs:19567 recursively propagates `obj_c` upward
через each chain level, emitting `nova_self->buf` N times. Field
cache cannot help — only 1 AST read.

Solution: new AST pre-pass `chain_norm` adjacent k callnorm. Detects
fluent chains of depth ≥ 2 with known-fluent methods on @F roots.
Rewrites:

  @F.m1(a).m2(b).m3(c) → { let _chain_root_<N>_F = @F;
                          _chain_root_<N>_F.m1(a);
                          _chain_root_<N>_F.m2(b);
                          _chain_root_<N>_F.m3(c);
                          _chain_root_<N>_F }

In C output: `nova_self->buf` appears ONCE (let-binding), then
`_chain_root_<N>_buf` for each push. Same semantics, 1 memory load
instead of N.

Implementation (~700 LOC):
- compiler-codegen/src/chain_norm.rs NEW (~500 LOC)
  - FLUENT_BUILTIN_METHODS hard-coded list (30 entries: push/append/
    extend_from/copy_from/insert/reserve/fill/clear + write_*)
  - normalize_chains_module entry-point + recursive walkers
  - try_extract_outer_fluent_chain detection (top-down)
  - build_chain_block rewrite
- compiler-codegen/src/lib.rs: + pub mod chain_norm;
- 14 pipeline-integration sites (all callnorm callers updated)
- 10 unit tests
- nova_tests/plan123_4_4/v123_4_4_writebuffer_chain_semantic_ok.nv
  (depth-3 + depth-4 semantic preservation)

Verification (release nova-cli + clang):
- 10 chain_norm unit + 1 runtime fixture (2 tests) PASS
- Plan 123 all 14 directories PASS (parallel-run transient
  contention noted; standalone все pass)
- Pre-existing 33 lib failures (parser/lints/sum_schema) are Plan 114
  `let`-removal unrelated к this work
- **Integration confirmed:** prelude WriteBuffer/StringBuilder chains
  now emit `_chain_root_<N>_buf` once instead of triplicate
  `nova_self->buf`

Spec: D217 amend Plan 123.4.4 (~120 lines).
Plan doc: docs/plans/123.4.4-codegen-chain-root-temp.md.

Followups:
- [M-123.4.4-user-fluent-detection] — V2 TypeDecl-driven fluent
  detection (replaces hard-coded list с FnDecl `-> @` signature check)
- [M-123.4.4-non-self-receivers] — extend к chain roots like
  `local.push().push()`

🎯 **Umbrella 123-followups-2026-06-04 — all 5 sub-plans CLOSED.**
- Plan 123.5.4 V5.4 explain deep-walk ✅
- Plan 123.7.7 V7.7 chain receiver IPA ✅

Pragmatic decision: вместо строго phased rollout (Ф.1 → full test → Ф.2
→ ... через ~36-53h) реализовать **all 4 whitelist tiers в один helper**
(throw + panic/exit + interrupt + user-never + recursive) — Ф.1-Ф.4
сжаты в одну реализацию.

Обоснование (зафиксировано в plan-doc §Risks):
- Helper строго **codegen-local + trailing-only** — основной risk
  (R1 + L1: повтор корневой ошибки прошлой попытки через stmt-walking)
  снят design-decision'ом, не phased validation'ом
- Trip-wire comment в коде + explicit list whitelisted ExprKind
- Все 4 whitelist уровня structurally tested by ≥17 positive +
  ≥2 negative fixtures
- Full nova test gate всё равно бежит — phased rollout добавлял
  только wall-time, не качество

Изменения (commit e91367f98e4):
1. compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs (+221 -11):
   - `block_trailing_diverges(b)` — trailing-only check, fallback
     last `Stmt::Throw`/`Stmt::Return`/`Stmt::Expr` если trailing=None
   - `expr_diverges_125(e)` — whitelist Ф.1-Ф.4 (throw / interrupt /
     panic / exit / user fn-never direct call / recursive if-let-match-block)
   - `type_ref_is_never_125(ty)` — single-segment "never" path match
   - `debug_if_infer_125(...)` — diagnostic env-var NOVA_DEBUG_IF_INFER=1
   - Wired 4 inference sites: emit_if_expr (Ф.1893), infer_expr_c_type::If
     (Ф.28817), emit_match two-pass (Ф.22773), infer_expr_c_type::Match
     (Ф.28877)
   - emit_block_into skip emit_zero_assign для divergent block —
     избегает CC-FAIL «incompatible type» при non-trivial element ty

2. spec/decisions/04-effects.md §D25:
   - Bootstrap (2026-05-06) обновлён — Plan 125 переключает паттерн
     `if cond { throw } else { val }` с known-bug → полноценный support
   - Whitelist в spec
   - Trip-wire: codegen-local vs types/mod.rs distinction

3. spec/decisions/08-runtime.md §«never»:
   - Plan 125 result-type inference rule с примером
   - Full divergent-expr whitelist
   - Codegen ограничение trailing-only + stmt-position constraint

4. docs/simplifications.md:
   - `[M-91.13-if-expr-divergence-aware-inference]` ✅ CLOSED entry
   - 6 followup markers зарегистрированы (по дублю — section
     дублирована в файле, preexisting state)

5. nova_tests/plan125/ — 20 фикстур (≥15 positive + ≥2 negative
   per acceptance criteria):
   - Ф.1 (5 verified PASS): if_then_throw_else_str, if_else_throw_then_str,

## 2026-06-05 (later) — Plan 118.5 V3 nice-to-have polish closure

После V3 + audit gap-fix closure аудит выявил 5 «nice-to-have» дополнений (не блокеры). User confirmed «исправь это без упрощений как для прода сейчас» — все 5 landed parallel workflow + sequential commit-per-task split (5 commits).

### Fixes

1. **D175/D176 forward-ref banners** (commit `a825eb370e1`) — добавлены blockquote-banner'ы у D175 (readonly field freeze) и D176 (readonly T modifier) с указанием на D216 V3 §V3.1 storage-class semantics. Reader старого D-блока теперь видит ссылку на newer rules.

2. **ffi-cookbook V3 hint** (commit `975ec2e644a`) — новая секция «Pointer modifier rules (V2/V3)» сразу после Quick reference TOC. 5-item cheatsheet (`*T` / `mut * T` / `unsafe * T` / `* unsafe T` / chain) + cross-refs к typed-pointers.md и migration guide. Discoverability для FFI authors.

3. **README typed-pointers link** (commit `883338436ce`) — добавлена строка в Contents TOC top-level README.md → docs/typed-pointers.md. После V3 closure typed-pointers.md стал user-facing документом.

4. **safe keyword examples** (commit `9d6da364660`) — в examples/typed_pointers/basic_pointer.nv добавлены 3 новых external fn declarations + dedicated test{}-block демонстрирующие §V3.4 safe escape:
   - `ffi_borrow_buffer(p unsafe * safe Buffer)` — Rust `*const T` analog (outer unsafe ptr c safe pointee)
   - `observe_readonly_view(p ro * safe ro Buffer)` — intentional ro re-application past stopper (без safe → E_REDUNDANT_TYPE_MODIFIER)
   - `raw_alloc_slot(p unsafe * safe unsafe Buffer)` — opaque uninit-pointee handle
   Module-level doc-comment extended с V3 §V3.4 section. **Verified via release nova check: PASS.**

5. **??commit_F4?? placeholder** (commit `7b9c5f64fca`) — в docs/plans/118.5-right-binding-rule-migration.md (line 237) был unresolved placeholder в V1 commit sequence list. Replaced с реальным SHA `c075afc0b5a` (V1 Ф.4 partial: unsafe T MaybeUninit read enforcement + 6 fixtures). Sub-agent сначала ошибочно поставил V3 Ф.4 SHA — исправлено orchestrator-ом по context (line 237 это V1 sequence, line 597 — V3, который уже корректен).

### Merge

Merged plan-118.5 → main как commit `da1f981fd85` (Merge plan-118.5 nice-to-have polish). Без push.

### State

Plan 118.5 V3 ✅ **ABSOLUTELY CLOSED** — V1 + V2 + V3 + Ф.6 + audit gap-fixes + nice-to-have polish. Zero open items. plan118_5_v3 17/17 PASS + basic_pointer.nv example PASS. typed-pointers.md user-facing doc в V3 canonical form + discoverable из README. Migration guide для downstream users. D175/D176 forward-pointers к V3.1 storage-class rules.

  emit_c.rs. Populated during method/free-fn registration scan.

  type erasure теряет never→nova_int information).
- `expr_diverges_125` extended: `ExprKind::Call { func: Member { obj,
  name } }` branch lookup'ит obj's C type + (stripped Nova_ prefix
  form) + ident-name fallback для static-method `Type.method()`.
- 3 fixtures: method_call_never_user_type, method_call_never_static,
  method_call_never_runtime.

**[M-125-codegen-never-cast]** ✅ CLOSED
- New helper pair: `emit_divergent_with_target_125(expr, target)` +
  `typed_zero_value_125(target)` в emit_c.rs.
- `emit_expr_with_target_type` top — short-circuit когда target ≠
  nova_int|nova_unit И expr_diverges_125(expr).
- Post-processes comma-expr `(side_effect, (nova_int)0LL)` substituting
  trailing dummy с target-typed zero (pointers → `(T)NULL`, ints/floats
  → `(T)0` / `(T)0.0`, structs → C99 compound literal `(T){0}`, unit →
  `NOVA_UNIT`).
- 3 fixtures: never_cast_let_typed, never_cast_arg_position,
  never_cast_f64_target.

== 2026-06-05 — Plan 110: CRITICAL bug fix [M-110.x-cleanup-shield-deadline-underflow]
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p114-4
> Branch: plan-110.10-existing-type-consumable (off main fb81c46d8fd)

External agent reported bug durante test catalog work: nv_shield_check_deadline
producing 712392ms over budget для 11s test, breaking P9/P11/N12 + existing
stress_iso_3e baseline. Reported в моей Plan 110.x subsystem.

Pivoted from planned 110.10 (Channel/socket Consumable) to urgent bug fix.

Root cause:
  • nv_consume_enter_shield(int deadline_ms) overwrote cancel_deadline_ns
    с new value БЕЗ saving prev. Nested consume{} blocks: inner's tiny budget
    shadowed outer's larger budget.
  • nv_consume_leave_shield() cleared deadline ТОЛЬКО когда mask=0 (fully
    unshielded). Nested case: inner leaves but mask still > 0; outer body
    resumes seeing inner's stale (shorter) deadline.
  • Outer body running longer than inner's stale budget → suspend point fires
    bogus CleanupTimeoutError. Cumulative нагрузка appeared as huge over_ms
    "underflow" в reports.

Fix three-step (commit af4e7d96a62):
  1. Runtime (fibers.h):
     - nv_consume_enter_shield(int deadline_ms) -> int64_t: returns prev
       deadline before set.
     - nv_consume_leave_shield(int64_t prev_deadline): restores prev (instead
       of conditional clear-on-mask-zero).
  2. Codegen (emit_c.rs::emit_consume_scope): saves enter's return value в
     fresh local int64_t per consume-block; passes saved prev к leave call.
  3. Spec D196 R4 amend: documents shadow-and-restore semantics для nested
     shield deadlines.

Test added: nested_shield_deadline_restore_v1_1.nv — outer 1000ms wraps
inner 5ms; outer body sleeps 50ms post-inner-exit. Pre-fix would fire
CleanupTimeoutError; post-fix sleep succeeds.

Regression: 5/5 key Plan 110 fixtures PASS на release nova-cli
(deadline_fire_e2e_v1_1, typed_cleanup_timeout_v1_1, shield_deadline_check_t3_2,
codegen_consume_throw_caught, register_finalizer_lifo_v1_1).

Plan 110.10 (Channel/socket Consumable wrappers) — DEFERRED durante
implementation attempt. Discovered architectural blocker:
  • Existing exemplar (MutexGuard) requires type declared `consume`.
  • Making ChanWriter/socket types consume = breaking change for existing
    Plan 21 / Plan 83.12 users.
  • Original plan-doc undersized: assumed simple @on_exit method addition
    к existing built-in types would work. Not the case.

Plan 110.10 status flipped 🆕 PLANNED → 🟡 V1 partial (bug fix landed,
implementations deferred). Plan-doc updated с 3 design questions для V2
reopen + recommendation list.

Lessons:
  • External-agent bug reports — critical to triage immediately, не defer.
    Bug in Plan 110.x subsystem actively breaking other agents' tests.
  • Plan-docs based on recon estimates can undersize architectural scope.
    110.10 plan-doc said «mostly mechanical»; implementation revealed
    consume-type modifier requirement (breaking change).
  • Honest scope flip > silent push: 🆕 PLANNED к V1 partial с explicit
    blockers > shipping broken implementation OR proceeding silently.

Marker tally:
  • 🟢 [M-110.x-cleanup-shield-deadline-underflow] CLOSED (af4e7d96a62).
  • 🔴 [M-110.10.1 / 110.10.2 / 110.10.3] DEFERRED к V2 design session.

== 2026-06-05 — Plan 110.x: [M-110.x-on-exit-throws-leaks-shield] CLOSED
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p114-4
> Branch: plan-110.x-on-exit-throws-shield (off main 1ab146e2a21)

Audit followup discovered durante post-fix verification (parallel workflow,
2026-06-05) of [M-110.x-cleanup-shield-deadline-underflow]. Pre-existing
edge case в consume-scope codegen: on_exit C-call ran outside any local
setjmp; if on_exit body threw (D158 failable cleanup), longjmp routed к
caller's NovaFailFrame, skipping nv_consume_leave_shield → shield mask
leaked (cancel deferral persistent в caller fiber) + outer's deadline
never restored.

Root cause:
  • emit_c.rs::Stmt::ConsumeScope emit pattern called on_exit C-call bare
    после body setjmp frame popped (line ~15192).
  • leave_shield ran AFTER on_exit (line ~15210), unreachable если on_exit
    threw.
  • Pre-existing: same gap existed BEFORE the R4 fix; R4 simply made the
    no-throw path correct.

Fix three-step:
  1. Spec D196 R4b amend: leave_shield MUST execute on every exit path
     (success, body throw/panic, on_exit throw/panic). Re-throw composition
     follows D193 R5 + D197 R3 (body=primary, on_exit=suppressed).
  2. Codegen wrap (emit_c.rs):
     - New NovaFailFrame _consume_on_exit_frame_<id> around on_exit C-call.
     - setjmp catches on_exit throw/panic; on_exit_threw kind (0/1/2).
     - leave_shield UNCONDITIONAL.
     - if (body panic) → nv_panic body. If (on_exit panic) → nv_panic
       on_exit. If (body+on_exit throw) → nv_compose_suppressed + rethrow
       body. If (body throw only) → rethrow body. If (on_exit throw
       only) → rethrow on_exit.
     - Cleanup observability hook fires only if on_exit succeeded.
  3. Test fixtures (nova_tests/plan110/):
     - on_exit_throws_shield_restored_v1_1.nv: POS — outer/inner where
       inner.on_exit throws.
     - on_exit_throws_compose_v1_1.nv: composition POS — body+on_exit
       both throw → MultiError composed.
     - on_exit_throws_handler_catches_v1_1.nv: compile-only — wrap shape.
     - on_exit_throws_nested_deadline_restored_v1_1.nv: nested R4+R4b
       interaction.

Regression на release nova-cli:
  • plan110: 48/0 PASS (включая 4 новых fixture'а).
  • plan100_4_1: 16/0 PASS (D158 MultiError composition).
  • plan100_4_2: 9/0, plan100_4_4: 13/0, plan100_4_5: 4/0.
  • plan103_9: 20/0, plan100_3: 10/0, plan108_1: 16/0, plan108_3: 14/0.
  • plan108, plan100_6, plan99: same FAIL count как main (pre-existing).

Marker tally:
  • 🟢 [M-110.x-on-exit-throws-leaks-shield] CLOSED.
  • Plan 110 family bug-fixes complete: R4 (deadline shadow) + R4b
    (exception safety) — production-grade closure для consume-scope
    shield semantics.

Lessons:
  • Parallel completeness audit (workflow с 3 subagent'ами) caught
    pre-existing edge case missed manual review. Worth running после
    нетривиального codegen fix.
  • Codegen setjmp wrap pattern reusable: emit_defer precedent (line
    13918-13944) mirror'нут exactly для on_exit wrap. Same NovaFailFrame
    + nova_fail_push/pop + setjmp/longjmp + nv_compose_suppressed.
  • Runtime test с Fail handler не для всех throw paths работает (handler
    path uses _nova_interrupt_top chain separate от fail-frame chain) —
    standard compile-only verification pattern достаточно для marker
    closure.
