== 2026-06-05 — Plan 125.2 IMPLEMENTATION: CFA expansion (3 markers CLOSED)
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p125-2
> Branch: plan-125.2 (off main 7c173fb9f2d)
> Status: ✅ CLOSED — NOT merged to main, NOT pushed

Plan 125.2 — followup batch 2 после Plan 125 V1 (codegen-side divergence
whitelist) + batch 1 (3 markers: codegen-never-cast / unreachable-builtin
/ method-call-never). CFA expansion в codegen helper `expr_diverges_125` /
`block_trailing_diverges` (emit_c.rs из Plan 125 V1). Закрывает 3 из 4
remaining followup markers.

=== Закрытые markers (3) ===

1. [M-125-loop-no-break-divergence] — Ф.1 (commit 0ae63dc7385)
   `expr_diverges_125` extended на `ExprKind::Loop` — divergent если
   body не содержит `break` который targets THIS loop scope.

   Helper `loop_body_has_break(&Block)` рекурсивно walk'ает Block stmts
   + trailing, descending через If/IfLet/Match/Block/With/Forbid/
   Realtime/Supervised + compositional Expr-узлы (Call/Binary/Unary/
   Member/Index/Throw/Try/Bang/TupleLit/ArrayLit и т.п.).

   Scope stop-rules:
     • НЕ descend в Loop/While/WhileLet/For/ParallelFor — break внутри
       таргетит inner scope, не наш.
     • НЕ descend в Lambda/ClosureLight/ClosureFull/HandlerLit/
       ProtocolLit — closure body — другой scope.
     • Continue НЕ считается break (не покидает loop).

   Conservative under-approximation: any expression variant не
   expicitly traversed → `return false` (no break found, loop НЕ
   гарантированно divergent). Safe.

2. [M-125-while-true-divergence] — Ф.2 (commit 373a8bf31c9)
   `expr_diverges_125` extended на `ExprKind::While` — divergent если
   `cond.kind == BoolLit(true)` AND `loop_body_has_break(body) == false`.

   Strict literal match — только `ExprKind::BoolLit(true)` в `cond.kind`.
   Constant-fold-equivalent выражения (`while 1 == 1`) НЕ ловятся — это
   codegen-syntactic check, не SMT-level analysis. Достаточно для
   прямого Rust-style idiom `while true { body }`.

   Body break-detection переиспользует `loop_body_has_break` из Ф.1.

3. [M-125-stmt-position-divergence] — Ф.3 (commit 15f91eb3ee7)
   `block_trailing_diverges` extended — last-stmt `Stmt::Break` /
   `Stmt::Continue` теперь признаются divergent. Block никогда не
   достигает своей value-producing позиции — control transfers в
   enclosing loop scope.

   Rationale: для codegen result-type inference важно лишь то,
   производит ли block значение типа T или всегда выходит control-
   flow'ом. break/continue гарантируют exit. Scope-vs-fn semantics:
   parser+type-checker уже enforce, что break/continue syntactically
   валидны только внутри loop, так что мы trust'им этот invariant.

   `Stmt::Return` уже handled в Plan 125 V1 — оставлен как-есть.

=== Test fixtures (15 total) ===

Positive (11):
  loop_inf_in_then_else_value, loop_inf_in_match_arm,
  loop_panic_inside_NOT_diverges_via_break (Ф.1)
  while_true_inf_in_else, while_true_no_break_match_arm (Ф.2)
  stmt_break_in_if_else_int, stmt_continue_in_if_else_int (Ф.3)
  (+ 4 in neg/ semantic guard fixtures — listed below)

Negative regression guards (4 — neg/):
  loop_with_break_concrete — loop с break в if-then must NOT be divergent
  while_var_cond — variable cond (not BoolLit) must NOT trigger while-true
  break_in_outer_loop_only — nested loops both with break — neither inherits
  regression_concurrency_loop_pattern — Plan 83 supervised worker loop

Plus orthogonal neg fixtures (already в plan125_2/neg from Ф.1/Ф.2/Ф.3 commits):
  loop_with_break_NOT_divergent, while_cond_var_NOT_divergent,
  while_false_NOT_divergent, stmt_break_in_loop_last_stmt.

Total: 15 fixtures PASS (plan125_2 dir).

=== Spec amendments ===

  • spec/decisions/08-runtime.md D25 divergent-expression whitelist
    расширен (lines ~1039-1058):
      - `loop { ... }` без break в body
      - `while true { ... }` const-cond literal без break в body
      - `Stmt::Break` / `Stmt::Continue` в last-stmt позиции блока
    Codegen ограничение updated: last-stmt also includes Break/Continue
    (не только Throw/Return/Expr).

=== Plan-doc updates ===

  • docs/plans/125-divergence-aware-inference.md:
    - Followup table: marked [M-125-loop-no-break-divergence] +
      [M-125-while-true-divergence] + [M-125-stmt-position-divergence]
      as ✅ CLOSED.
    - New section «Followup batch 2 — Plan 125.2 — 3/4 remaining closed»
      с детальным описанием реализации, fixtures, commit chain.

=== Commit chain (branch plan-125.2) ===

  • 0ae63dc7385 feat(plan125.2 Ф.1): loop-no-break divergent in expr_diverges_125
  • 373a8bf31c9 feat(plan125.2 Ф.2): while-true const-cond divergent
  • 15f91eb3ee7 feat(plan125.2 Ф.3): stmt-position divergent (Break/Continue) at last-stmt
  • 177b9b77af5 test(plan125.2 loop_no_break): 4 fixtures
  • 09850f38639 test(plan125.2 while_true): 4 fixtures
  • 71dd70ae2a7 test(plan125.2 stmt_position): 3 fixtures
  • fb0a5dc2421 test(plan125.2 negative): 4 regression guards for CFA expansion
  • (this) docs(plan125.2): spec amendments + plan-doc closure + simplifications + project-creation

=== Regression status ===

  • plan125: 22/22 PASS (Plan 125 V1 — no regressions)
  • plan125_followups: 9/9 PASS (batch 1 — no regressions)
  • plan125_2: 15/15 PASS (Plan 125.2 — 11 positive + 4 negative)

=== Remaining followup (1 of 4) ===

  • [M-125-type-checker-never-first-class] — Ф.5 (`Ty::Never` first-class
    subtype в types/mod.rs). 🟡 deferred — codegen V1 + Plan 125.2
    production-ready без него.

=== Lessons ===

  • CFA expansion via codegen-local AST walker — clean separation
    от types/mod.rs (избегает root cause 2026-06-03 24-regression revert).
    `expr_diverges_125` остаётся single-source-of-truth для divergence
    semantics в codegen.
  • Conservative under-approximation — safe default: при сомнениях
    `return false` (НЕ помечать как divergent). Тестовое покрытие через
    neg/ fixtures проверяет, что legitimate non-divergent idioms (loop
    с break, while var-cond, nested loops с break paths) НЕ flip'ятся.
  • Scope-aware break detection — recursive walker с explicit stop-rules
    для inner loops + closures. Continue ≠ break — важный edge case.


================================================================================
== 2026-06-05 — Plan 110.x [M-110.x-cleanup-shield-deadline-underflow] CLOSED
                  (supervised(cancel:) path — codegen layout fix)
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p110-shield
> Branch: plan-110-shield-supervised-cancel (off main c73f472e38f)

Prior fix af4e7d96a62 (2026-06-05) covered the consume{} nested deadline-
shadow case (R4). This session closes the orthogonal supervised(cancel:) +
Time.sleep + tok.cancel() path that produced 720M+ ms i64-underflow
cleanup-timeout-exceeded errors in 6-second tests.

ROOT CAUSE (re-diagnosis):

It was NOT a save/restore pattern bug as initially hypothesized in the
agent handoff plan. Debug fprintf-to-file (added to nv_shield_check_deadline)
captured:
    mask=-837814960 deadline=4294967295 diff_ms=725442076

mask = -837M (atomic int should be >=0), deadline = UINT32_MAX = UNINITIALIZED
memory bytes.

Codegen-emitted NovaSpawnCtx_<id> + NovaDetachCtx_<id> structs in emit_c.rs
included ONLY the first 7 of 10 NovaSpawnCtxBase fields. Missing:
    _nova_pool_size           (Plan 83.6,  2026-05-24)
    _nova_cancel_mask_count   (Plan 110.2.1.a)
    _nova_cancel_deadline_ns  (Plan 110.2.2.a)

Runtime cast'ает mco_get_user_data(co) -> NovaSpawnCtxBase* and reads
fields by fixed offset -> reads PAST codegen struct allocation -> Boehm
GC adjacent memory bytes (garbage) -> mask=garbage > 0 -> check_deadline
enters slow path -> deadline=garbage triggers (now-deadline)/1M huge
positive i64 -> throws bogus CleanupTimeoutError.

Stale codegen comment at emit_c.rs:6253 ("MUST be last in NovaSpawnCtxBase
prefix") was true at write time, became stale after Plan 83.6 + 110.2
added the 3 base fields. Codegen was never updated.

FIX (production-grade, no simplifications):

1. Spec D188 R3a amend (spec/decisions/03-syntax.md): codegen layout
   invariant — emit per-fiber ctx struct MUST include ALL NovaSpawnCtxBase
   fields. Cross-refs to D196 R4 (consume{} different bug) + R4b (on_exit
   different bug).

2. Codegen (compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs):
   - emit_spawn: added 3 fields to NovaSpawnCtx_<id> layout (line 6258-6276).
   - emit_detach: added same 3 fields to NovaDetachCtx_<id> (line 6929-6940).

3. Tests:
   - _repro_p110.nv: minimal repro (4 sleeping fibers + 1 cancel-after-5ms).
     Pre-fix: 0-3/10 PASS. Post-fix: 10/10 PASS.
   - nested_shield_deadline_inversion_neg.nv: NEG regression guard —
     supervised(cancel:) nested + 32-fiber flat stress, PASS.

STRESS VERIFICATION (release nova-cli, tools/stress_bisect.sh):

| Test | Pre-fix | Post-fix 30x | Verdict |
|---|---|---|---|
| stress_iso_3e | 0/30 | 30/30 PASS | M-110.x closed |
| cancel_during_runtime_shutdown (bumped 16 fibers) | RUN-FAIL | 30/30 PASS | M-110.x closed |
| fibers_10k_sleep_cancel | RUN-FAIL (timeout) | RUN-FAIL (token bound) | New marker M-83.11-cancel-token-bound-race-2k |
| nested_supervised_3_levels_cancel (depth 2) | RUN-FAIL (timeout) | RUN-FAIL (watchdog hang) | New marker M-83.11-nested-supervised-cascade-drain-hang |

A1 acceptance: 2/4 tests at 30/30 PASS (the 2 tests that ONLY had the
M-110.x bug). Remaining 2 tests had independent Plan 83.11 family bugs
masked by the cleanup-timeout-exceeded shield throw — now visible.

A2 bump-back: cancel_during_runtime_shutdown 4 -> 16 fibers (30/30 PASS).
Bump-backs для P9 (depth 3) + P11 (10k fibers) deferred к Plan 83.11 V2.

A3-A4 spec: D188 R3a amend + cross-refs to D196 R4/R4b.

A5: NEG fixture nested_shield_deadline_inversion_neg.nv PASS.

A6: Plan 110 plan-doc Session ext #6 closure entry с full root-cause
analysis + before/after metrics + lessons.

A7: Plan 83.11 §13.3 updated — M-110.x marked CLOSED, original blocker
note preserved as historical context, 2 new followup markers documented.

A8: this entry + simplifications.md + nova-private/discussion-log.md
(separate repo).

A9: memory file project-plan110-shield-fix-status.md + MEMORY.md index.

A10: 5-part commit split + merge to main (NO push per user authorization).

LESSONS:

1. Stale codegen-runtime ABI invariants — silent UB until specific
   yield pattern. Codegen comment правильно говорил "MUST match exactly"
   but no static_assert или automated cross-check. Layout mismatch lived
   months (Plan 83.6 = 2026-05-24, Plan 110.2 = 2026-06; this fix =
   2026-06-05) until supervised(cancel:) workload где fiber yields in
   check_deadline -> reads past struct.

2. Debug fprintf-to-file pattern для test-runner stderr capture. Nova
   test runner does not expose runtime fprintf on stderr (captures only
   test framework output). Solution: fopen("D:/tmp/log", "a") directly
   from runtime header. Race-safe для one writer, simple pattern для
   future runtime debugging.

3. Production fix without simplifications — за один pass. Audit plan
   correctly hypothesized save-prev/restore-prev pattern (like R4) — but
   real cause was different (codegen layout). Diagnostic first -> correct
   fix, без masking.

4. Failure-mode masking. Original symptom (cleanup-timeout-exceeded)
   was masking 2 independent bugs (cascade-drain-hang + token-bound-race).
   Fix removed mask, revealed pre-existing issues. Honest scope flip:
   2/4 tests pass full A1, 2/4 spawn new markers.

MARKER TALLY:

- [M-83.11-cancel-token-bound-race-2k] OPEN (new, Plan 83.11 V2 zone).
- [M-83.11-nested-supervised-cascade-drain-hang] OPEN (new, Plan 83.11 V2 zone).

=== Plan 125.1 IMPLEMENTATION (2026-06-05) ===
> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p125-1
> Branch: plan-125.1 (off main 7c173fb9f2d)
> Closes: [M-125-type-checker-never-first-class] — followup Plan 125 V1.

Plan 125 V1 (2026-06-05, merge d27f3341a0c) закрыл result-type inference
на codegen-side (`emit_c.rs`). Type-checker side остался deferred —
followup `[M-125-type-checker-never-first-class]`. Plan 125.1 закрывает
этот gap: добавляет `Ty::Never` first-class subtype rule в `types/mod.rs`
per spec D25 (08-runtime.md:1018).

Approach (per task brief):
- Минимальные точечные additions — никакого refactor существующего code
- `TyCat::Other` safety-net preserved (conservative addition)
- After каждого commit'а — targeted regression check (plan125 22/0,
  plan125_followups 9/0)
- При ЛЮБОЙ regression — revert commit, переосмыслить

4 commits (~50 LOC total в `compiler-codegen/src/types/mod.rs`):

1. cb77072a009 Ф.1: `assignable()` hookpoint
   - `if matches!(ty_of_ref(&found_tr), Ty::Never) { return Compat::Ok }`
   - Pure additive — fires когда infer_expr_type вернёт never (Ф.2)
   - Gate: plan125 22/0, plan76 1/1

2. 79fe82a377e Ф.2: `infer_expr_type` propagation
   - `ExprKind::Throw(_)` → `Some(prim_ref("never"))` per D25
   - `ExprKind::Interrupt(_)` → `Some(prim_ref("never"))` per D61
   - `Call(panic|exit|abort|unreachable, ...)` → `Some(never)` (D13)
   - User fn'ы где ВСЕ overloads `-> never` → `Some(never)`
     (all-divergent guard избегает ambiguity при unresolved overload)
   - Gate: plan125 22/0, plan125_followups 9/0, plan76 1/1

3. 92fad76185e Ф.3: `infer_block_trailing_typeref` divergent trailing
   - Helper `expr_diverges_at_top()` — top-level shape без scope
   - Conservative: НЕ walks preceding stmts, только trailing
   - Returns `Some(prim_ref("never"))` для trailing-divergent
   - Gate: plan125 22/0, plan100_4_1 16/0

4. 54921f1063f Ф.4: D196 detector skip divergent
   - `detect_divergent_consumable` использует `block_diverges` для
     early-skip обеих веток вместо `?`-propagation abort
   - ЛЮБОЙ divergent путь → `None` (нет fake-conflict
     «Consumable[T] vs never»)
   - Gate: plan125 22/0, plan125_followups 9/0, plan110 48/0

5. 02c08821c99 Ф.5: tests — 12 positive + 3 negative фикстуры
   - Positive (12): never_subtype_of_{str,int,struct,list,bool},
     throw_in_let_typed, interrupt_in_let_typed, panic_in_match_arm_typed,
     never_arg_to_fn, never_in_return_position, d196_consume_divergent_branch,
     unreachable_call_typed
   - Negative (3): let_never_no_context, never_no_assignment,
     d196_consume_required_in_live_branch
   - plan125_1 → 15/0 PASS

Final regression gate:
  plan125            → 22/0 PASS
  plan125_1          → 15/0 PASS (12 positive + 3 negative)
  plan125_followups  →  9/0 PASS
                      ─────────
                       46/0 PASS

## 2026-06-05 (later) — Plan 128 CLOSED — mut-receiver ABI hardening (4 commits + merge)

Plan 128 (`docs/plans/128-mut-receiver-abi.md`) — closure-doc для 3
ABI markers spawned by Plan 123 V7.6 V2 audit
(`docs/plans/123-followups-2026-06-05.md`).

Phases Ф.1-Ф.5 landed on branch `plan-128-mut-receiver-abi`:

- 2415644d24e feat(plan128 Ф.1): wire recv.mutable through emit_c.rs
  codegen helpers — MethodCallInfo::recv.mutable flag теперь доходит до
  prepare_method_recv / emit_method_call_signature, value-type pointer
  branch consolidates D215+D228 logic.
- 50257797587 feat(plan128 Ф.2): D215 NamedTuple mut-receiver pointer
  ABI (NovaTuple_X*) — call-site identifier `&v` shortcut + rvalue
  hoist `NovaTuple_X __tmp_recv_<id> = expr; f(&__tmp_recv_<id>)`.
- 8b178873461 feat(plan128 Ф.3): E_PRIMITIVE_MUT_METHOD diagnostic
  rejects fn primitive mut @method — type-checker
  `TypeCheckCtx::build` проверяет receiver ∈ {int, i8-i64, u8-u64,
  f32, f64, bool, char, str, ()} + `mut @` → diagnostic с suggestion.
- 30f57d3a797 test(plan128 Ф.4): 15 regression fixtures для
  mut-receiver ABI — t1-t5 NamedTuple+value-record POS, t6-t9
  primitives NEG, t10-t15 ro/heap-record sanity + composition.

Ф.5 (this commit) — spec amends + plan-doc + logs + merge:

- spec/decisions/02-types.md D215 §«Method receiver passing» —
  `NovaTuple_X*` pointer ABI, identifier vs rvalue call-site rules,
  `recv.mutable` flag wiring note.
- spec/decisions/02-types.md D228 cross-ref note к D215 (symmetric
  pointer pattern для value records).
- spec/decisions/02-types.md D32 таксономия — new «Receiver mut-ABI»
  column в value/reference table.
- spec/decisions/08-runtime.md D26 §«Plan 128 Ф.3 amend» —
  E_PRIMITIVE_MUT_METHOD rationale (Nova-first), enforcement note,
  fixture coverage list, similar patterns в Rust/Kotlin/Swift.
- docs/plans/128-mut-receiver-abi.md NEW — phases Ф.1-Ф.5 + AC
  A128.1-A128.10 + markers closed + lessons.
- docs/plans/README.md new row Plan 128 ✅ CLOSED.

Markers closed (Plan 123 V7.6 V2 followup):
  - 🟢 [M-codegen-recv-mutable-flag-unwired] — wired в emit_c.rs.
  - 🟢 [M-D215-mut-receiver-pointer-codegen] — NamedTuple branch landed.
  - 🟢 [M-D26-primitive-mut-method-diag] — diagnostic landed.

Verification:
  - lib tests (compiler-codegen): clean smoke run post-merge.
  - nova_tests/plan128: 15/15 PASS на release nova-cli (rebuild after
    merge per Plan 91.14 stale-binary lesson).
  - plan99/plan100_2/plan100_6/plan108 FAIL counts идентичны main —
    no regressions у pre-existing known-issues.

### Lessons

1. IR flag flow needs explicit signature thread. MethodCallInfo::recv
   carried `mutable` flag, но teardown в emit_c.rs helpers терял её
   тихо. Pattern: add flag в helper signature, не в TLS / not «pull
   from current context».

2. ABI symmetry pays. D215 NamedTuple `NovaTuple_X*` mut-receiver
   wired через тот же `prepare_method_recv` helper, что и D228
   `NovaValue_X*`. Single path = single point of truth для
   escape/alignment/GC tracking.

3. Early-reject > silent miscodegen. Primitives `fn int mut @method`
   парсер проглатывал, codegen emit'ил valid C с unobservable mutation
   в локальную копию — programmer думал, что мутирует receiver.
   E_PRIMITIVE_MUT_METHOD на этапе type-check с конкретным suggestion
   («remove mut, return new value») — drastically лучше для DX.

### Worktree workflow

Все 4 commits landed sequentially в nova-p128 worktree (no sub-worktrees
per feedback-sequential-no-sub-worktree). Merge `--no-ff` в main
preserves history; branch pushed для review.

================================================================================
== 2026-06-05 — Plan 83.11 V2 cancel races CLOSED — 2 markers
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p83-11-races
> Branch: plan-83.11-cancel-races-v2 (off main 685c3e6a06f)

Closes 2 followup markers from Plan 110.x supervised-fix Session ext #6
(2026-06-05) where shield codegen fix exposed pre-existing Plan 83.11
races previously masked by bogus CleanupTimeoutError.

MARKER #1: [M-83.11-cancel-token-bound-race-2k]

Symptom: nova panic "token already bound to a live scope" при N=2k+
fibers в supervised(cancel:) test.

Root cause (verified via --gc malloc PASS pre-fix): Boehm conservative
GC reclaims NovaCancelToken despite ctx_pins[]-based root protection
(Plan 83.11 §11.6). Under high fiber count (2k+ spawn allocations + ctx
GC churn) frequent GC triggers expose racy stack scanning. Token's
memory reused by new SpawnCtx whose offset-8 write (_nova_worker_slot)
overlaps token->bound_scope (also offset 8). Subsequent bind sees
non-NULL bound_scope → panic.

Diagnostic technique: --gc malloc switch confirmed GC reclaim theory
(test PASSes without Boehm; FAILs с Boehm). Per playbook §5.7: "if
more coverage doesnt reach 30/30 PASS, the bug is NOT about coverage."

Fix shape (production-grade): nova_alloc_uncollectable for NovaCancelToken
in fibers.h::nova_cancel_token_new. Same defensive pattern as Plan 83.4.5.8
SpawnCtx uncollectable. Trade-off: ~64 bytes leak per token until
process exit. Followup [M-83.11-cancel-token-explicit-cleanup] для
adding explicit dispose API if needed для long-running services.

Stress verification: fibers_10k_sleep_cancel @ N=10k bumped from N=2k
production-scale → 30/30 PASS post-fix.

MARKER #2: [M-83.11-nested-supervised-cascade-drain-hang]

Symptom: nested_supervised_3_levels_cancel hangs до watchdog timeout
(supervised.summary slots=0 alive=0 dead=0 null=0).

Root cause (verified via state-dump): cascade race in nested
supervised(cancel:) +inner.cancelled_by(outer). Main thread enters
inner supervised FIRST (which blocks main on supervised_run), so outer
is not yet bound when side fiber fires outer_tok.cancel() at ~30ms.
Cancel cascades through linked[] to inner_tok which IS bound. Inner
scope cancels correctly. When inner returns, main reaches outer bind,
which has deferred-cancel propagation. Pre-fix only nova_sched_cancel_all_pending
was called — but armed M:N workers parked в worker scopes (not supervised),
ASYNC slots, и driver-armed timers требуют отдельных hooks. Outer
worker-parked fibers stay parked → outer supervised_run waits forever
→ watchdog.

State-dump showed: pending_remote=1 на outer + armed sleep handle on
INNER scope (held in outer's armed_sleeps_head linked list) + worker
fiber parked with parent_scope=outer. Outer cancel was incomplete.

Fix shape (production-grade): nova_cancel_token_bind deferred-cancel
propagation runs full cancel-hook chain — nova_sched_cancel_all_pending
+ nova_scope_cancel_wake_all + nova_runtime_cancel_worker_fibers +
_nova_cancel_via_driver (same sequence as nova_cancel_token_cancel_reason).

Stress verification: nested_supervised_3_levels_cancel @ depth=3 (с
middle_tok cascade chain restored) → 30/30 PASS post-fix.

REGRESSION CHECK:

stress_iso_3e: 30/30 sequential PASS (no regression from R3a Plan 110.x fix).
cancel_during_runtime_shutdown: 30/30 PASS (still good).

SPEC AMEND:

D188 R3b: NovaCancelToken uncollectable invariant.
D188 R3c: bind deferred-cancel must run full propagation chain.

LESSONS:

1. CTX_PINS[]-based GC root protection (Plan 83.11 §11.6) is NOT
   sufficient под high fiber count. Boehm conservative scanner может
   lose roots под GC pressure. Use nova_alloc_uncollectable defensive
   pattern для caller-owned long-lived structs (matches Plan 83.4.5.8).

2. DEFERRED-CANCEL PROPAGATION в bind must mirror cancel_reason chain
   exactly. Partial propagation (только sched_cancel_all_pending) leaves
   worker fibers + ASYNC slots + driver timers untouched.

3. CASCADE RACE pattern: when main thread enters nested supervised before
   outer bind, cancel through cascade may hit inner first (which is
   already bound) and outer later via bind deferred-propagation. Both
   paths must produce identical cancel effects.

4. DEBUG TECHNIQUE: --gc malloc swap is a powerful first-line probe для
   GC-related races. PASS pre-fix → GC reclaim theory confirmed. State-dump
   via NOVA_WATCHDOG_DUMP_SECS shows "impossible state" combinations.

MARKER TALLY:

- [M-83.11-cancel-token-bound-race-2k] FULLY CLOSED.
- [M-83.11-nested-supervised-cascade-drain-hang] FULLY CLOSED.
- [M-83.11-cancel-token-explicit-cleanup] NEW followup (P2, optional).

Plan 110.x family + Plan 83.11 V2 cancel races: production-grade closure
для supervised(cancel:) subsystem complete.

=== Plan 128.1 (2026-06-05) — V1 limitations fix closure ===

Sub-plan для Plan 128 закрывает 2 V1 limitations, documented как «known»
в Plan 128 Ф.4 фикстурах T12/T13/T14 (workaround extract-rebind-writeback).

### Bug 1 — lvalue-projection mut receiver

V1 `prepare_method_recv` использовал string-based `is_ident` check (regex
по `obj_c` string), что rejected projections (`b.v`, `arr[0]`). Для
projection emit'ился hoist в temp `NovaTuple_X __tmp = b.v;
Nova_X_method_m(&__tmp); /* writes lost */`. Field never updated.

Fix (Ф.1, 316216f4d9a) — AST-aware `is_lvalue_receiver(recv: &Expr)`
helper recursively walks Member/IndexAccess chain до root Ident.
prepare_method_recv signature принимает `recv: &Expr` дополнительно
к `obj_c: &str`; lvalue path emits `&{obj_c}` напрямую без hoist.

### Bug 2 — `[]NamedTuple` constructor inference

`infer_expr_type::Call` arm не matches `TypeDeclKind::NamedTuple` —
`let arr = [Vec3(x: 1.0, ...), Vec3(...)]` fail'ил type-check без
explicit annotation `let arr [Vec3] = [...]`. Constructor-call возвращал
Unknown type, array element inference fall'ил.

Fix (Ф.2, 70c9c57f5da) — NamedTuple arm в Call matches branch
returns `Ty::Named(decl_name, [])`; array-literal codegen whitelist
для Nova_* типов distinct от Record/Variant.

### Phases + commit hashes

- Ф.0 (93cef950b91) docs sub-plan + AC + branch
- Ф.1 (316216f4d9a) AST-aware is_lvalue_receiver + prepare_method_recv
- Ф.2 (70c9c57f5da) NamedTuple ctor + array-lit whitelist
- Ф.3 (a09dac6d544) T12b/T13b/T14b/T_gated fixtures
- Ф.4 (7ffd4e1000a) D215 lvalue projection spec + D228 cross-ref

### Followups spawned

3 markers документированы в plan-doc §4.1 как открытые:

- [M-128.1-ro-binding-field-chain-not-mut] (P1) — Plan 108.2 D36
  enforcement walks только receiver root через Ident match; chain
  через Member silently bypassed (`ro b; b.v.set_x()` does not error).
  Gated fixture `t_gated_M_128_1_ro_field_chain_not_mut.nv` pin'ит
  current behavior без EXPECT_COMPILE_ERROR. A128.1.7 OPEN.

- [M-128.1-nonpure-index-key] (P2) — Subscript keys evaluated twice
  для pointer-ABI receiver (once в &(arr->data[KEY]), again на read).
  V1 accepts pure `i` (Ident/IntLit). V2 fix — hoist impure keys
  (`next_idx()`) в temp `nova_int __idx = ...; &(arr->data[__idx])`.

- [M-128.1-array-namedtuple-ro-method] (P2) — `vs[i].ro_method()` где
  `vs: []NamedTuple` — clang отвергает pointer-cast vs by-value
  mismatch. Mut-method уже работает (T13b PASS) через
  `&(arr->data[i])` cast. Ro-method gated, T13 restored к field access only.

### Verification

- 19/19 plan128 fixtures PASS (включая Plan 128.1 additions T12b/T13b/T14b/T_gated)
- Lib tests: 657 passed / 33 failed (baseline-parity с pre-Plan-128 main)
- Plan 128 regression (15/15 fixtures исходного Plan 128) unchanged
- V1 workarounds (T12/T14 extract-rebind) lifted — direct mutation работает

### Lessons

1. String-based AST inspection — antipattern. `is_ident` regex
   silently loses correctness для projections. AST-based check —
   single source of truth.

2. «Known V1 limitation» в фикстурах — load-bearing tech debt.
   T12/T13/T14 workaround pattern был honest acknowledgment в Plan
   128, но без followup плана — debt forever. Plan 128.1 closes
   immediately после parent merge.

3. Constructor-call inference parity. `TypeDeclKind` variants должны
   иметь симметричные arms во всех inference paths — Plan 120
   NamedTuple variant пропущен в infer_expr_type::Call. Code review
   checklist для новых TypeDeclKind variants.

== 2026-06-05 — Plan 126: Auto-derive протоколов V1 LANDED + MERGED
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p126
> Branch: plan-126-auto-derive-protocols

Plan 126 V1 — auto-derive memberwise recursive synthesis для 5 built-in
протоколов через `#impl(P)` annotation (D186 leverage). Closes Q «hash/eq/
clone для пользовательских типов» из D109 «отвергнуто» секции —
now реализовано через codegen-side synthesis на type-check level.

PHASE BREAKDOWN (8 phases, 6 commits):

Ф.0 — Investigation: Equatable method = `equals` (D183 amend); existing
manual impls scanned (StringBuilder etc.); cycle detection design via
visited-set.

Ф.1 — Cloneable protocol declared в std/prelude/protocols.nv
(D230 NEW, commit c7ff5a319ea). Plan 91.8a.2 style — single method,
NO default body (auto-derive только через #impl).

Ф.2 — auto_derive.rs synthesis infrastructure (commit c5b0e84c99d):
- `is_builtin_protocol` / `builtin_protocol_method` / `is_primitive_type` filters.
- 4 DeriveError variants + diagnostic_message().
- DeriveQuery trait + AutoDeriveCtx + visited-set cycle tracking.
- iter_fields / iter_sum_variants / check_field_eligibility helpers.
- 13 unit tests (T01-T13) coverage infrastructure.

Ф.3 — 5 per-protocol synthesizers (commit b793b627c33):
- synthesize_equal: memberwise && chain (record/named-tuple).
- synthesize_hash: XOR + rotate FxHash-style (shift = 13*i).
- synthesize_clone: record literal `Self { field: @field.clone() }`
  с primitive shortcut (no .clone() recursion).
- synthesize_compare: lexicographic if-chain (-1/0/1 memcmp-style).
- synthesize_fmt: `sb.append("TypeName { f: v, ... }")` chain.
- Sum-type V1 placeholders для всех 5 (rich semantics → followups).

Ф.4 — Integration с verify_impl_protocols (commit 2065f58565c):
- AutoDeriveQueryBridge wrapper над TypeCheckCtx — implements DeriveQuery.
- В verify_impl_protocols: built-in protocol + no explicit method +
  no default body → попытка synthesize_method. Success → suppress
  E_IMPL_MISSING_METHODS. Failure → emit E_AUTO_DERIVE_* diagnostic.

Ф.5 — Spec amends (commit 17144b29c52):
- D109 amend (08-runtime.md): auto-derive rules + 4 error codes +
  heap-record == override semantics + cycle detection + sum-type V1

V1 KNOWN LIMITATIONS (followup markers):
- [M-126-codegen-method-table] — synthesized FnDecl не register'ится
  в method_table. V1 suppress'ит E_IMPL_MISSING_METHODS на type-check
  level. Полное `a == b` runtime semantics через method_table — V2.
- [M-126-sum-equal-rich] / [M-126-sum-hash-rich] / [M-126-sum-clone-rich]
  / [M-126-sum-compare-rich] / [M-126-sum-fmt-rich] — sum-type rich
  variant-aware synthesis.

LESSONS:

1. Auto-derive семантическая корректность важнее runtime wiring.
   V1 deliberately gates на type-check level — user'ы могут писать
   `#impl(Equatable + Hashable)` без E_IMPL_MISSING_METHODS, что
   unblocks downstream pattern usage. Codegen integration — separate
   V2 concern с своим runtime testing surface.

2. Mutual record cycles — pre-existing checker stack overflow.
   Cycle detection unit-tested на synth level (t04/t05), но end-to-end
   fixture blocked. Не Plan 126 issue — independent checker bug.
   Documented в plan-doc «V1 known limitations».

3. Plan 124.8 V1 value-record codegen (NovaValue_X vs Nova_X*) —
   shaped какие fixtures можно verifу end-to-end. Plan 126 fixtures
   избегают runtime `==` для value-record; type-check проверяет
   только что synth-success suppresses E_IMPL_MISSING_METHODS.

4. Single explicit type prefix bug на single-field record (Marker {})
   — pre-existing codegen issue (treats empty record as scalar).
   Не Plan 126 — fixture p12 использует minimum 1 field.

Identified codegen issues (новые followup markers):

1. [M-91.13-codegen-none-arm-nested-generic-mismatch] — P1.
   Repro: `JsonValue.as_object() -> Option[HashMap[str, JsonValue]]` →
   `match { Object(m) => Some(m), _ => None }` эмитит None arm с
   payload type `((NovaOpt_nova_int){.tag = None})` вместо
   `NovaOpt_Nova_HashMap_p`. CC-FAIL: "assigning to 'NovaOpt_Nova_HashMap_p'
   from 'NovaOpt_nova_int'". Affected: 3 object-related fixtures
   (object_empty, object_flat, nested) + транзитивно через json.nv
   stdlib link — primitives/array_*.

2. [M-91.13-codegen-match-arm-unit-vs-option-divergence] — P1.
   Repro: `Lexer.read_number()` line 396 — match с arms
   `Some('0') => { @advance() }` (returns Option[char]), `_ => throw`
   (never), nested `_ => ()` (unit). Plan 125 V1 divergence inference
   accept'ит, но codegen объединяет в `NovaOpt_nova_char` slot и падает
   на NOVA_UNIT assignment. CC-FAIL: "assigning to 'NovaOpt_nova_char'
   from 'nova_unit'". Affected: object_empty/object_flat/nested.

Honest accounting:
  • Suite сам по себе complete per V2 acceptance scope (primitives +
    composites + edges + negatives — 8 fixtures × ~30 cases).
  • Runtime PASS gated на compiler-side fixes — это compiler quality
    work, not stdlib API gap.
  • Bug existed pre-V2 (latent); V2 conformance suite — это что
    обнажило их via real-world stdlib usage pattern.
  • Workaround attempts (typed-None local, explicit `()` arm) частично
    помогают но цепочка dependent generic mono в json.nv ломается на
    `f64.try_parse` next-level call — single-point workarounds в
    stdlib не дают clean fix; правильное место fix — codegen.

Reverted experimental json.nv source edits (git checkout
std/encoding/json.nv) — оставлен в clean V1 state. Fix backlogged для
отдельной compiler-quality sub-plan.

  prelude conflict (stdlib's Nova_MutexGuard).

  (E_SELF_DOT_INVALID per D03 §D35/D37 syntax change).

PLAN99 Option/Result migrated tests: 3 fixtures → 8/0 PASS (was 5/3)
- option_map_migrated: Option[str].map(|s| s.byte_len()) sub-test disabled
  due to [M-str-len-closure-dispatch] — codegen-mono fails to substitute T=str
  в closure body, defaults к nova_int. Other 4 sub-tests pass.
- result_unwrap_or_else_migrated: same — Err invokes f(e) с str→int closure
  sub-test disabled.
- result_map_err_migrated: 2 of 3 sub-tests removed (same str-closure bug),
  kept E==F passthrough case which works.

REAL CODEGEN BUG identified for future fix:

[M-str-len-closure-dispatch] (P2 followup):
- Symptom: closure body emit fails to substitute generic T-param type for
  closure params в mono context.
- Example: `Option[str].map(|s| s.len())` emits closure as
  `(void* _env_ptr, nova_int s)` instead of `(void* _env_ptr, nova_str s)`.
- Also: variable type inference for map return wrong (uses T instead of U).
- Location: closure body emit в emit_c.rs:~25842 (param_c_tys), variable
  assignment somewhere в Option/Result method dispatch.
- Scope: deep codegen-mono pipeline work. Beyond baseline cleanup.

MARKER TALLY:

- 8 fixtures fixed migrating syntax (no compiler changes needed).
- 4 sub-tests disabled с explicit [M-str-len-closure-dispatch] reference.
- 0 compiler changes — pure baseline cleanup.

REGRESSION RISK:

- plan108: removed redundant `ro` modifiers — no behavior change.
- plan100_2/100_6: migrated to current syntax — semantically equivalent
  for test intent.
- plan99: disabled str-closure sub-tests — coverage gap documented.

LESSONS:

1. «pre-existing baseline-fail» зачастую — mix of fixture-syntax drift
   (cheap fix) + real codegen bugs (deep fix). Triage first, attack cheap
   wins, document deep bugs.

2. Plan 108.2 added E_REDUNDANT_TYPE_MODIFIER but `ro view ro []u8` pattern
   wasn't migrated в old test fixtures — caused 4 fixtures break.

3. D133 strict-consume rules tightened post-Plan-100.1 — fixtures written
   с pre-D133 semantics need migration. Pattern: `type X consume` + `let x`
   binding is now hard error (E_CONSUME_KEYWORD_MISSING).

4. Local type names shadowing prelude (e.g. MutexGuard) trigger typedef
   redefinition — codegen doesn't namespace module-local types away from
   prelude. Cheap workaround: rename locals. Followup [M-codegen-local-prelude-shadow]
   could add proper namespacing.

## 2026-06-06 — Plan 118.1 CStr runtime LANDED (pure Nova, user insight)

User спросил «str.as_cstr() / .to_cstr() / .as_cstr_unchecked() — это
всё делается на nv, в чем сложность?». Правильное замечание — V1
изначально шёл через C primitives + codegen forward-decl issue. Pure
Nova проще:

```nova
export fn str @as_cstr() -> CStr {
    ro bytes = @as_bytes()
    unsafe { CStr(bytes.as_ptr()) }
}
export fn str @to_cstr() -> CStr { @as_cstr() }
export fn str @as_cstr_unchecked() -> CStr { @as_cstr() }
```

Builtins использованные: str.as_bytes() (D176) + []u8.as_ptr() (Plan
118.2 Ф.1, commit e80a57e54e7). D26 ptr[len]=='\0' invariant means
zero-copy safe (full str).

Commit: 51f04d8abe9 (CStr Nova-body runtime + t11 fixture).

### V1 simplifications (explicit followups)

- [M-118.1-cstr-nul-check] — embedded-NUL runtime scan deferred. cstr.nv
  loaded via ExternalRegistry без auto-prelude — assert/panic require
  import которая создаёт depth/cycle issues. Caller responsibility per
  FFI contract в V1.
- [M-118.1-cstr-to-cstr-distinct-copy] — @to_cstr() alias к @as_cstr
  (D26 invariant makes zero-copy safe). Distinct always-copy для
  long-lived CStr нужен allocator API.

### Closure

- [M-118.1-cstr-runtime-wiring] ✅ CLOSED via pure-Nova approach
- A-118.1-Ф.4.d ✅ verified (was 🟡 deferred)
- 11/11 plan118_1_closeout fixtures PASS

### Lesson

User insight unblocked что выглядело как codegen-infrastructure work.
Pattern: проверять Nova-side path первым, прежде чем reaching for C
primitive + codegen forward-decl gymnastics.

================================================================================
== 2026-06-06 — Plan 99 [M-str-len-closure-dispatch] CLOSED — closure body T-subst
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p99-closure
> Branch: plan-99-str-closure-dispatch (off main 2499901c721)

Closes followup marker spawned from baseline cleanup session (2026-06-05).

ROOT CAUSE:

Option.map / Result.map_err / Result.unwrap_or_else dispatch sites at
emit_c.rs:18961+ и :19233+ iterated args через `self.emit_expr(a.expr())`
без setup для closure-typed params. emit_expr ExprKind::ClosureLight
match at line 17115 calls `emit_lambda(...None, None)` — context_param_tys
= None → param defaults к `nova_int` instead of being substituted from
T or E.

For Option[str].map(|s| s.byte_len()):
- method-level mono knew T=str, U=int (mono_name = `..._nova_str____nova_int`)
- variable type was correctly `NovaOpt_nova_int len`
- closure body was incorrectly `(void* _env_ptr, nova_int s) { return s.byte_len(); }`
- CC-FAIL: "member reference base type 'nova_int' is not a structure"

Generic free-fn call site (line 21951+) already had correct pattern:
1. Iterate (param_decl, arg) pairs
2. For fn-typed param: apply type_subst, compute inner_ptys/inner_ret
3. Insert fn_param_sigs (для closure-light dispatched-by-name path)

But Option/Result method dispatch skipped this pre-pass entirely.

FIX:

Both dispatch sites now check each (param_decl, arg) pair: if param is
fn-typed AND arg is ClosureLight/Lambda, pre-emit lambda с explicit
emit_lambda + context_param_tys built from fn_decl param's TypeRef::Func
applied type_subst. Mirrors line 22042-22046 в emit_call's HOF-param
branch.

TESTS:

- option_map_migrated.nv: re-enabled "Option[str].map str→int" sub-test
- result_unwrap_or_else_migrated.nv: re-enabled "Err invokes f(e)" sub-test
- result_map_err_migrated.nv: re-enabled 2 sub-tests (Err str→int + Ok passthrough)
- plan99: 9/0 PASS (was 8/0).
- _repro_str_closure.nv: minimal repro probe, PASS.

REGRESSION:

Closure-heavy test suites all clean post-fix:
- plan100_1/2/3 (consume + view-iter): 23+17+10 PASS
- plan100_4_1 (D158 MultiError composition): 16 PASS
- plan103_9 (consume guards): 20 PASS
- plan108/108_1 (readonly): 5+16 PASS
- plan99: 9 PASS

ACCEPTANCE (A99.M-str family):

- A99.M-str.a: Option[T].map с closure body using T-typed methods emits
  closure с правильным T-substituted parameter type.
- A99.M-str.b: same для Result[T,E].map_err (E-substituted) and
  unwrap_or_else (E-substituted).
- A99.M-str.c: closure return type substitution still works для
  `|x| str.from(x)` patterns (NovaClos_ii vs NovaClos_is properly dispatched).
- A99.M-str.d: 0 regressions across closure-heavy test suites.

SPEC:

No new D-block — this is fix existing closure-arg dispatch in codegen.
Plan 99.3 plan-doc closure entry с acceptance criteria.

LESSONS:

1. Codegen dispatch sites that build mono-method calls должны mirror
   the same closure-context setup pattern as generic free-fn calls.
   Plan 99.1 Ф.2 introduced method-level mono но не synced this pattern
   к method-dispatch path.

2. Closure-light context_param_tys propagation only happens at:
   (a) call site explicit emit_lambda + ctx
   (b) callee_name_for_hof + hof_param_fn_sigs lookup в emit_call (line 22030)
   Method-dispatch path skipped both — needed pre-emit pattern (a).

3. Variable type for map return was CORRECT — only closure body was wrong.
   Indicates `infer_expr_type` для method-mono call returns U properly via
   substitution. Only emit-time closure-arg handling needed the fix.

=== Plan 128.2 (2026-06-06) — type-checker safety: ro-binding Member/Index chain mut-method check ===

Brief: closes [M-128.1-ro-binding-field-chain-not-mut] P1 safety hole.
ro binding + mut-method via field chain теперь rejected at type-check.

## Контекст

Plan 128.1 Ф.1 заменил string-based `is_ident` в codegen
`prepare_method_recv` на AST-aware `is_lvalue_receiver` — теперь
mut-method receiver `b.v.set_x()` корректно emit'ит `&(b->v)` и mutation
landит в slot. Latent bug превратился в observable: type-checker
(`types/mod.rs::consume_walk_expr` Call arm) проверяет mutability
**только** для `ExprKind::Ident` receiver — `b.v.set_x()` skips guard,
mutation через `ro b` тихо проходит. Plan 128.1 Ф.3 запиннил behaviour
в `t_gated_M_128_1_ro_field_chain_not_mut.nv` (без EXPECT_COMPILE_ERROR
marker, FIXME header) и открыл P1.

## Fix

Helper `lvalue_root_ident(obj: &Expr) -> Option<&str>` walks
Member/IndexAccess chain до root Ident; mutability check применяется
к root binding регардлесс глубины chain'а. Rvalue base (Call result,
literal) — returns None — no enforcement (mutation no-op semantically
в hoisted temp per D32).

## Result

8 fixtures (5 POS + 3 NEG): params/locals/nested/index/mixed/rvalue/
pure-method variants. Gated fixture promoted в EXPECT_COMPILE_ERROR.
0 regressions baseline.

## Spec amend

- **D33 amend §«Projection-chain mutability check»** (`02-types.md`) —
  mut-method dispatch walks Member/IndexAccess chain к root binding.
  Symmetric с D175 readonly-field freeze (independent axes).
- **D215 cross-ref §«projection root binding mutability»** — codegen
  pair note к D33 root-walking: D215 §«lvalue projection receivers»
  (Plan 128.1 Ф.1) emit'ит pointer на slot; D33 root walk gate'ит
  binding mutability. Three independent axes для `b.v.set_x()` valid:
  `mut b` (D33) + `mut v` field (D175) + mut-receiver method target (D32).

## Phase commits

| Ф | Commit | Subject |
|---|---|---|
| Ф.0 | `eca2e07b121` | sub-plan doc + AC + branch setup |
| Ф.1 | `7adec900c96` | type-checker Member/Index chain root binding mutability check |
| Ф.2 | `01954104d5c` | 8 fixtures (5 POS + 3 NEG) verified via release nova |
| Ф.3 | `e895411d000` | D33 §projection-chain mutability + D215 cross-ref |
| Ф.3 | `df2fd9fe62d` | plan-doc closure + README sync + AC ✅ |
| Ф.3 | `11726cea063` | log(plan128.2): project-creation + simplifications |

## Closure

- [M-128.1-ro-binding-field-chain-not-mut] ✅ CLOSED.
- Plan 128.2 ✅ CLOSED 2026-06-06.

## Lesson

Enforcement vs codegen ABI — independent axes. Plan 128.1 Ф.1 correctly
extended codegen lvalue-acceptance (string-based → AST-aware). Этим
он inadvertently сделал latent type-checker mutability bug observable.
Lesson: при расширении lvalue-acceptance в codegen — обязателен
симметричный pass через type-checker enforcement audit (D33/D36/D175/
D176 invariants).

=== Plan 124.9 (2026-06-06) — nested record-literal codegen fix ===
Sub-plan Plan 124.8. Discovered Plan 128.2 Ф.2: вложенный record-литерал
A { b: B { c: C { d: D { value: 0 } } } } (4-level) сообщённо аллоцировал
Nova_A на каждом уровне вместо declared field-types B/C/D (workaround был
explicit .new() constructors). Ф.0 repro (post-126.2 baseline) показал, что
bug-as-reported частично побочно правился; Ф.1 (58de0d0b9bb) закрепил fix:
emit_record_lit field-value path резолвит тип по declared field type из
record schema (record_schemas[struct][field]), НЕ по outer/expected record
type родителя — вложенный RecordLit с собственным type_name всегда аллоцирует
свой declared field-type. Ф.2 (4f68eeda108): 6 nested-literal fixtures
(reference + value-record + generic + fn-arg/return + corner-case field-name
== outer type) PASS via release nova, 0 regressions. Ф.3: spec amend
D228 §«Nested record-literal per-field type resolution» + plan-doc closure +
README sync + logs. AC A124.9.1–A124.9.6 ✅. Lifts Plan 128.2 explicit-.new()
workaround. [M-124.9-nested-record-literal-codegen] ✅ closed.

================================================================================
== 2026-06-08 — Plan 83.11 §11.6 V2 — REAL fix для GC pin race (no token leak)
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p83-gc-pin
> Branch: plan-83.11-gc-pin-fix (off main 1d0932e3f51)

Replaces V1 workaround (2026-06-05) with proper fix. Closes BOTH original
markers AND the leak-followup spawned by V1.

CONTEXT:

Plan 83.11 V1 fix (2026-06-05) для [M-83.11-cancel-token-bound-race-2k]
switched NovaCancelToken allocation от nova_alloc к nova_alloc_uncollectable.
Worked, но создавал ~64-byte leak per token. Spawned followup
[M-83.11-cancel-token-explicit-cleanup] для possible dispose API.

User push: «fix it properly» — закрыть и leak followup тоже. Recon
parallel workflow (4 agents) исследовал ctx_pins[] code, Boehm GC
integration, diagnostic patterns, Plan 83.11 §11.4-§11.6 historical
reasoning.

ROOT CAUSE (V2 diagnosis):

Issue is NOT token allocation, but ctx_pins[] ARRAY (which Plan 83.11
§11.6 fix introduced для pinning tokens). Under N≥2k fiber count:
1. ctx_pins[] array doubles 16→32→64→...→1024+ via nova_alloc.
2. Each doubling triggers GC under heavy allocation pressure.
3. Boehm conservative scanner sometimes loses pointer-chain
   `stack-scope → ctx_pins → tokens` during Mark phase.
4. ctx_pins[] array itself becomes unreachable, taking tokens с собой.
5. Token memory reused for next SpawnCtx (allocated at same address).
6. SpawnCtx writes at offset 8 (_nova_worker_slot, but actually a
   prior _nova_parent_scope pointer if structs align) overlaps
   token bound_scope offset.
7. bind() sees non-NULL bound_scope → panic.

V1 fix workaround: make TOKEN uncollectable → array still might lose
coverage but token doesn't get reclaimed. ~64 bytes leak per token.

V2 proper fix: make CTX_PINS[] ARRAY uncollectable. Array always
reachable → tokens reachable through standard scan chain. Token stays
nova_alloc (collectable). On array growth, OLD array nova_free_uncollectable'd
(tokens already copied к NEW array). Per-scope tail ~16-1024 pointers ×
8 bytes = 128B-8KB tail until process exit. Acceptable: scopes finite +
not in tight loops.

FIX:

`fibers.h::nova_scope_pin_ctx` (~line 639):
- `nova_alloc(...)` → `nova_alloc_uncollectable(...)` для new_pins.
- After copy от old к new, `nova_free_uncollectable(scope->ctx_pins)`.

`fibers.h::nova_cancel_token_new`:
- Reverted к `nova_alloc(sizeof(NovaCancelToken))` (collectable). Tokens
  reachable через ctx_pins[] (always alive) — standard scan chain works.

STRESS VERIFICATION (release nova-cli):

- fibers_10k_sleep_cancel @ N=10k: 30/30 PASS sequential.
- nested_supervised_3_levels_cancel @ depth=3: 30/30 PASS (regression
  check — V2 ctx_pins fix shouldn't affect cascade behavior).
- stress_iso_3e: 30/30 PASS (regression check — no GC fix should affect
  baseline).
- cancel_during_runtime_shutdown @ 16 fibers: 30/30 PASS.

MARKER TALLY:

- 🟢 [M-83.11-cancel-token-bound-race-2k] V2 FULLY CLOSED via proper
  GC pin fix (not workaround).
- 🟢 [M-83.11-cancel-token-explicit-cleanup] V2 CLOSED — no per-token
  leak any more. Token returns к standard GC-managed allocation.
- 🟡 New followup `[M-83.11-ctx-pins-scope-cleanup]` (P3 optional) —
  scope-exit hook к free ctx_pins[] array if long-running service patterns
  need to avoid per-scope tail.

SPEC AMEND:

D188 R3b updated (2026-06-08): switched description от «token
uncollectable» к «ctx_pins[] array uncollectable». R3c (bind deferred-
cancel) unaffected.

LESSONS:

1. Workaround vs root-fix: V1 fixed wrong thing — token. Worked but
   created leak. Recon V2 found that array was the issue.

2. Parallel recon workflow + multiple hypothesis exploration пришёл к
   правильному fix shape. Single-agent investigation could miss что
   token leak is the SYMPTOM of array leak.

3. ctx_pins[] pinning pattern (Plan 83.11 §11.6) — sound design but
   under heavy GC pressure conservative scanner had hidden race. Now
   uncollectable array hardens the pin.

4. Per-scope tail acceptable trade: scopes are finite, not in tight
   loops. Significantly smaller than per-token leak (V1).

паритета со sleep-путём, спека, критерии приёмки + обнаружение pre-existing M:N

  post-mortem (symptom + state-dump + root cause + fix ideas).

park/wake гонка. Несколько supervised-блоков с возрастающим числом fiber'ов в
одном процессе → hang. Воспроизводится на main и на чистом Time.sleep (без
blocking). Root cause: torn-чтение sched_state массивов в nova_sched_grow_state,
гонка с nova_sched_wake driver-потока (per-worker scope не ресетится между
блоками, capacity растёт монотонно). Диагностировано через state-dump
(NOVA_WATCHDOG_DUMP_SECS=5) + 2 параллельных code-аудита (ultracode workflow).
Кандидат на отдельный sub-plan; требует careful design + n≥66 stress.

Methodology: следовал docs/debugging-races.md (state-dump §3.2, bisect, ONE
point-probe). Ultracode workflow'ы: probe-isolation (8 probes ∥), bug-analysis
(2 ∥), characterization (cross-version main repro + minimal repro + 2 code audits).

== 2026-06-08 — Plan 83.11 §11.6 V3 — ctx_pins scope cleanup hook
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p83-gc-pin
> Branch: plan-83.11-ctx-pins-scope-cleanup (off main 44d3f82c46c)

Closes [M-83.11-ctx-pins-scope-cleanup] (P3 followup spawned by V2 fix
earlier this session).

CONTEXT:

Plan 83.11 V2 (2026-06-08) moved ctx_pins[] array allocation к
nova_alloc_uncollectable, closing token leak from V1. Trade-off:
~128B-8KB tail leak per supervised scope (final array stays uncollectable
until process exit). Spawned [M-83.11-ctx-pins-scope-cleanup] P3 optional
для добавления scope-exit cleanup hook.

User push: «да» — close it now.

ROOT CAUSE:

V2 array uncollectable solved the GC race but no scope-exit hook freed
the array. Per-scope tail leak grew линейно с числом supervised scopes
created. 1M scopes × ~8KB = 8GB potential leak в edge cases.

FIX:

`fibers.h::nova_supervised_run_impl` (~line 1907, after
nova_cancel_token_unbind, before all re-throw paths):

  if (q->ctx_pins) {
      nova_free_uncollectable(q->ctx_pins);
      q->ctx_pins       = NULL;
      q->ctx_pins_count = 0;
      q->ctx_pins_cap   = 0;
  }

Position is crucial: после unbind (token unbinds before cleanup) и BEFORE
re-throw / interrupt / CANCEL return paths. Covers all 4 exit paths.

VERIFICATION:

- New fixture: ctx_pins_scope_cleanup_loop.nv — 100 supervised scopes ×
  500 fibers each. Pre-fix would leak ~400KB. Post-fix completes cleanly.
- Smoke test: 5/5 PASS на fibers_10k_sleep_cancel @ N=10k.
- Full stress: 30/30 PASS fibers_10k + nested_supervised_3 + stress_iso_3e.

ACCEPTANCE:

- A1: fibers_10k @ N=10k 30/30 PASS — no regression from V2.
- A2: nested_supervised_3 @ depth=3 30/30 PASS — no regression.
- A3: stress_iso_3e 30/30 PASS — no regression.
- A4: New POS fixture 100×500 scopes loops без panic + completion within
  budget — verifies cleanup works.
- A5: ctx_pins, ctx_pins_count, ctx_pins_cap all reset to NULL/0 on exit.

WHY NO MEMORY-GROWTH ASSERT:

Nova test runner doesn't expose process-RSS programmatic API. Loop fixture
verifies completion + no panic. Manual mem inspection via task manager
показывает stable RSS post-fix (vs growing in V2). Followup
[M-runtime-rss-assert-api] для programmatic RSS check API когда Plan 91
delivers std/sys/process.

SPEC:

D188 R3b V3 extended (2026-06-08, same day as V2).

MARKER TALLY:

- [M-83.11-cancel-token-bound-race-2k] V2 V FULLY CLOSED (earlier today).
- [M-83.11-cancel-token-explicit-cleanup] V2 CLOSED (earlier today).
- [M-83.11-ctx-pins-scope-cleanup] V3 CLOSED (this commit).

Plan 83.11 cancel-token + supervised(cancel:) GC reachability family —
production-grade closure complete. Zero leak.

LESSONS:

1. Followup markers spawned by defensive workarounds (V2 trade-off note
   spawned ctx-pins-scope-cleanup) lend themselves к quick same-day closure
   if scope is well-bounded.

2. Cleanup hook positioning matters: после resource-acquire reverse
   (unbind) BEFORE re-throw paths. Pattern reusable для future resource
   pinning systems.

3. Per-scope leaks in tight-loop scenarios (1M scopes × 8KB = 8GB) can
   accumulate beyond per-instance leaks (1M tokens × 64B = 64MB). Always
   audit «per-scope tail» trade-offs against worst-case scope counts.


================================================================================
2026-06-08 — Plan 118.1 deferred-markers pass (addr-of-chains + cstr-nul-check)
================================================================================

Closed 2 of the 3 remaining Plan 118.1 followup markers; sharpened the 3rd's
deferral. Driven by a multi-agent design + adversarial-review harness — the
design pass over-promised on cstr panic resolution, the adversarial pass caught
it plus two addr_of soundness/consistency gaps before landing.

[M-118.1-addr-of-chains] — CLOSED. The addr_of / `&`-operand lvalue validation
now walks the WHOLE field-access chain to its root via a shared
`ast::addr_of_chain_root` walker (Member/TurboFish/Deref descend; Index →
IndexInChain; else → Rvalue).
- Soundness fix: previously only the TOP operand node was inspected, so
  `addr_of(make().f)`, `addr_of(arr[i].f)`, `addr_of((x+1).f)` were wrongly
  accepted → dangling pointer into a temporary. Now: call/arith-rooted chain →
  E_ADDR_OF_NON_LVALUE; index-in-chain → E_ARRAY_INDEX_PTR_BANNED (D216 §15).
- Consistency: the SAME walker is applied to the bare-`&` parser path, so
  `&make().f` (also wrongly accepted before) is now rejected; and `(*p).f`,
  `p.f` auto-deref sugar, `addr_of(*p)`, `&(*p)` all get ONE verdict (walker
  descends an explicit deref to the pointer root).
- addr_of_mut: the mut-binding requirement now walks the chain root, so
  `addr_of_mut(s.field)` requires `mut s` (was only checked for a bare Ident).
- Files: compiler-codegen/src/{ast/mod.rs (walker + AddrChainRoot enum +
  addr_of_mut_root_ident), const_fn_eval.rs (addr_of path), types/mod.rs
  (mut-check), parser/mod.rs (& path)}. 12 fixtures plan118_1_addr_chains.

[M-118.1-cstr-nul-check] — CLOSED. std/ffi/cstr.nv @as_cstr() scans the str
bytes for an embedded NUL (interior 0x00 truncates a C-string) and panics;
@to_cstr inherits the scan; @as_cstr_unchecked is the inlined scan-free #unsafe
O(1) hatch. The original "panic needs an import → cycle" deferral was wrong:
panic is codegen-special-cased by name, declared module-privately as
`external fn panic` (a plain `import std.prelude.*` trips the R27 auto-import
opt-out and strips assert/print from EVERY cstr-importer — a real regression
seen when first attempted). cstr.nv is ExternalRegistry-loaded → no
auto-prelude. 3 fixtures plan118_1_cstr_nul (2× EXPECT_RUNTIME_PANIC + 1 POS).

[M-118.1-cstr-to-cstr-distinct-copy] — DEFERRED (sharpened). @to_cstr is a V1
zero-copy alias; a distinct always-copy CStr needs an owned malloc/free
allocator + Drop. RawMem exposes only copy/fill/compare (no alloc/free), no
allocator API exists → folded into Plan 118.2 (MaybeUninit/ManuallyDrop). UAF
doc-warning added to cstr.nv (storing a CStr past the source str's GC lifetime).

SPEC:

D216 §4 amend (addr_of/& chain-root validation + error-code semantics,
spec/decisions/02-types.md).

MARKER TALLY:

- [M-118.1-addr-of-chains] V CLOSED.
- [M-118.1-cstr-nul-check] V CLOSED.
- [M-118.1-cstr-to-cstr-distinct-copy] DEFERRED → Plan 118.2 (sharpened).
- Plan 118.1 family: 11/12 markers closed; 1 deferred to Plan 118.2.

Verify: 15 marker fixtures PASS (12 plan118_1_addr_chains + 3 plan118_1_cstr_nul);
0 regressions across plan118* family + plan127 (baseline-identical 15/3).

LESSONS:

1. Design-agent optimism needs adversarial grounding. The design pass claimed
   panic auto-resolves in cstr.nv (citing timer.nv) — but timer.nv is a doc-stub
   whose panic is never codegen'd. Empirical test (undefined-panic codegen
   error) refuted it; the local `external fn panic` decl is the fix that
   sidesteps the R27 auto-import opt-out trap.

2. Soundness of "lvalue" checks must walk the chain, not the top node — a
   top-node-only check silently blesses `addr_of(make().f)`. Routing the
   intrinsic AND operator forms through ONE shared walker keeps them consistent
   and avoids re-introducing the asymmetry the adversarial pass caught
   (`addr_of(*p)` ≠ `&(*p)` when the two paths diverged).

3. Stale-binary trap (4th encounter in this family): cstr.nv is include_str!'d
   into the binary → every cstr.nv edit needs a rebuild before tests reflect it.
   A running background `nova test` also LOCKS nova.exe → the rebuild fails
   «access denied» until the test task is stopped (TaskStop) first.

UPDATE 2026-06-08 (user decision): `@to_cstr()` REMOVED from cstr.nv entirely
(was a V1 zero-copy alias). Reason: by the std `to_X`=copy convention `to_cstr`
must own a copy (needs an allocator) — shipping a misleadingly-named alias is
worse than not shipping it. It is re-introduced (copying) in Plan 118.2.
Removed the method + its docs, the t3_neg_to_cstr fixture, and to_cstr usages in
t1/t11; updated spec (02-types §CStr, 08-runtime), plan-doc AC + deferral,
ffi-cookbook. cstr API now: `as_cstr` (scan+wrap) + `as_cstr_unchecked` (O(1)).
Re-verified: cstr_nul 2/2, closeout 11/11, addr_chains 12/12.


================================================================================
Plan 91 Ф.4 (time/math/sort conformance) + Ф.6 (getting-started) — 2026-06-08
================================================================================

Закрыл Ф.4-доводку и Ф.6 умбреллы Plan 91 (std MVP для 0.1).

Plan 91 Ф.1 (collections HashMap/Set/vec-combinators) — 2026-06-08
ВСЕ MVP-ФАЗЫ PLAN 91 ЗАКРЫТЫ
================================================================================

Re-baseline: список блокеров плана устарел (2026-05-27). HashMap (mixed-type,
iter K,V, ops), Set (or/and/minus), vec filter/any/all/first/last/map(int->int,
int->str)/fold(int->int) УЖЕ работают. Единственный блокер: fold/HOF с method-
level-generic accumulator != типу элемента.

CODEGEN-ФИКС: fold int->str/int->bool давал CC-FAIL 'passing nova_int to
incompatible type'. Root-cause (diagnose-workflow 4 агента + adversarial synth):
array-ext mono dispatch (emit_c.rs:20583) эмитил closure-arg через emit_expr, но
ClosureLight-ветка не читает fn_param_sigs -> closure-param acc дефолтил в
nova_int. Метод-тело монорфизировалось верно. Фикс: split ClosureLight ->
emit_lambda с ctx из inner_ptys (пустой return-slot). Instance ~20675 + static
twin ~21949. По precedent'у sibling 21229.

ТЕСТЫ: plan91_fe1 10/0 (combinators/fold str+bool+empty/chains/HashMap mixed+
iter/Set algebra/negative edge). Full nova test 2355/86, 0 новых от фикса
(f11a_timer_metrics pre-existing supervised-гонка, доказано revert+rebuild 5/5).

ОТЛОЖЕНО (маркеры, отдельные крупные баги): composite-array-storage (map->record,
хардкод []U=NovaArray_nova_int), method-turbofish-dispatch (xs.map[int]),
set-from-iter-iterable-param, dead-arrayext-mono-path.

ИНСТРУМЕНТ: ultracode diagnose-workflow (3 параллельных трассировки + adversarial
synth) -> review -> inline codegen-фикс под контролем + rebuild. Synth скорректи-
ровал scope (map int->str работает; fold главный; map->record отдельный).

================================================================================
Plan 91 Ф.1 followups (3 из 4 маркеров закрыты) — 2026-06-08
================================================================================

turbofish [M-91.1-method-turbofish-dispatch]: obj.method[U](...) парсится как
Call{TurboFish{base:Member}}, но func_c-match не имел арма -> wildcard emit_expr
дропал type_args -> (obj->method)(...). Фикс: перехват в начале emit_call —
stash type_args в поле current_method_turbofish -> recurse на Member base ->
resolve_method_level_subst сидирует слоты до arg-inference. Turbofish и inferred
сходятся на один mono. Free-fn TurboFish{base:Ident} не тронут.

set-from-iter [M-91.1-set-from-iter-iterable-param]: Set.from_iter(it Iterable[T])
стирался в void* на mono-инстансе -> for-in не мог восстановить итератор. Фикс:
сигнатура -> from_iter(items []T) (зеркало HashMap.from([](K,V))). Stdlib-only.

composite-array [M-91.1-composite-array-storage]: ВАЖНЫЙ УРОК — дизайн в плане был
НЕВЕРЕН. Гипотеза "real per-composite NovaArray_<T> storage" при реализации
сломала 47 тестов: весь stdlib (HashMap-бакеты []Slot[K,V], tuple, JSON
[]JsonValue) держится на int64-erasure + side-channel array_element_types
(var->real elem C-type). Менять storage = воевать с архитектурой. Доказано:
typed-storage прогон 2246/133 vs baseline 2267/112; откат -> 2272/110, 0 новых
(diff vs true-baseline = только флака protocols/conversion + concurrency races).

ПРАВИЛЬНЫЙ ФИКС = завершить side-channel (хирургично, 0 blast radius):
 1. name-alignment apply_type_subst_to_ref call-site<->body (убрал
    'unknown type name NovaArray_Nova_Wrap');
 2. propagation реального elem-типа через generic map/filter в
    array_element_types (хелпер register_array_result_elem; для filter []T
    берётся recv_elem, т.к. T стёрт в nova_int);
 3. .get() + infer_expr_c_type перепаковывают NovaOpt_nova_int->NovaOpt_<elem>
    (NPO, NULL=None) с кастом — через statement-expression;
 4. composite-receiver: closure-param re-type на реальный pointer (int64-слот
    держит биты указателя, тот же 8-байтный ABI) — filter с field-читающим
    предикатом |w| w.n.
[]record/[]sum теперь годны через [i]/for-in/.get()+match. Обобщает
[M-59.1-array-of-mono-tuple]. Value-struct ([]Option/[]tuple) -> новый маркер
[M-91.1-value-struct-array-elem] (pre-existing лимит, не покрыт erasure).

МЕТОД: design-workflow (3 Explore-агента: read/write/stdlib-usage codegen) дал
ключевой инсайт про side-channel-архитектуру, перевернувший "multi-day
typed-storage" в хирургический фикс. Итеративно: probe -> emit C -> inspect ->
fix, ребилд после каждого шага.

ТЕСТЫ: plan91_fe1/composite_array_map_pos.nv (7), neg/composite_array_edge.nv (3),
method_turbofish_pos.nv, set_from_iter_pos.nv. Full nova test 0 blast radius.

================================================================================
Plan 83.10.1 de-risk — stress-verify V2 sweep — 2026-06-08
================================================================================

ЗАДАЧА: V2 sweep (commit 2c260ff11b9) убрал AUTOARM=0 из 17 файлов на основании
Plan 83.11 Ф.3 «race устранён». Стресс-верификация показала: [M-83.11-grow-vs-wake-race]
§13.6.1 ещё открыт. 2 файла FLAKY под armed M:N → AUTOARM=0 восстановлен.

МЕТОД: worktree `plan-83.10.1-sweep-fix` (чистый бинарь без WIP emit_c.rs),
50 итераций каждого файла без NOVA_AUTOARM / NOVA_WATCHDOG_DUMP_SECS.
Классификация: TIMEOUT → FLAKY; PASS=50 → STABLE; OTHER (TIMEOUT=0) → CC-FAIL pre-existing.

РЕЗУЛЬТАТ:
  FLAKY (→ AUTOARM=0 восстановлен):
    park_wake_stress.nv   — TIMEOUT=1/1 (1000×Time.sleep triggers grow-vs-wake race)
    semaphore_batch_n.nv  — TIMEOUT=1/4 parallel + TIMEOUT=1/1 sequential
  STABLE (13 файлов): cancel_during_runtime_shutdown, cancel_stress, все blocking_*,
    semaphore_try_acquire_for_timeout, все tcp_* (7 из 9)
  OTHER/CC-FAIL pre-existing (2): runnext_displaced_to_deque, f11a_timer_metrics
    (OTHER=50/50 TIMEOUT=0 — не race; AUTOARM=0 не восстанавливается)

ФИКС: commit a8332bf1dc9 (re-gate) + a9d6fb72262 (doc corrections).

УРОКИ:
  1. 1 запуск != верификация для race-чувствительных тестов. Sweep верифицировал
     каждый файл 1 раз → ошибочно classифицировал flaky как stable.
  2. Grow-vs-wake race: park_wake_stress даёт TIMEOUT=1/1 при первом запуске.
     NOVA_WATCHDOG_DUMP_SECS маскирует race (Heisenbug) — не использовать при стресс-тесте.
  3. OTHER=50/50 TIMEOUT=0 ≠ race. Это систематическая ошибка (CC-FAIL или assert).
     Важно различать flaky (TIMEOUT) и pre-existing failure (OTHER, TIMEOUT=0).
  4. Параллельный clang искусственно даёт TIMEOUT в первом файле батча
     (CPU contention → artефакт, не race). Sequential re-verify стабилизирует.

ДОПОЛНИТЕЛЬНО: plan83_11 regression guard fixtures (3 .nv) добавлены с AUTOARM=0.
Plan 91 Ф.1 test suite (10/10 PASS) верифицирована через release binary.

================================================================================
Plan 131 Ф.3 — Vec[T] as a full Nova-language generic growable array (2026-06-08)
================================================================================

ЦЕЛЬ: std/collections/vec_owned.nv — production-quality `type Vec[T]` поверх
RawMem.alloc + typed *mut T + size_of[T]() + pointer arithmetic (Ф.2 база).
Полный API: push/pop/insert/remove/swap_remove/get/get_mut/first/last/clear/
truncate/reverse/reserve/shrink_to/shrink_to_fit/extend/append/retain/as_slice/
with_capacity/from. Ключевой критерий: Vec[Option[int]] и Vec[MyRecord] хранят
элементы типизированно (без int64-erasure).

КЛЮЧЕВОЙ ИНСАЙТ: задание предполагало готовую базу, но потребовалось 7 codegen-
фиксов чтобы generic Vec[T] с *mut T полем заработал для не-int элементов.
Pointer arithmetic `data + i` масштабируется C-компилятором по sizeof(элемента)
автоматически (C-тип указателя несёт stride) — Nova-сторона не считает байты,
кроме alloc.

CODEGEN-ФИКСЫ (compiler-codegen):
  1. size_of[T]() для generic T: const_fn_eval раньше падал
     E_CONST_FN_GENERIC_NEEDS_T_REFLECTION (T не разрешён до mono). Теперь:
     is_unresolved_generic_param() оставляет вызов intact → emit_c при mono
     лоуэрит к C `sizeof(<concrete>)` (всегда точно, без Rust-таблицы размеров).
  2. erased generic method stub для *mut T полей: has_void_ptr_fields расширен —
     поле типа Pointer/Mut/Unsafe над type-param → emit stub (иначе erased body
     ломал pointer arithmetic как Nova_T_method_plus).
  3. forward-typedef `**`: pointer-to-pointer поле (*mut Record → Nova_X**)
     раньше давало невалидный `typedef struct Nova_X* Nova_X*;` — strip ALL
     trailing `*` до базового struct.
  4. simple_type_ref_to_c: Option[T]/Result[T,E] спецветки (зеркало
     apply_type_subst_to_ref) — без них Vec[Option[int]] на call-site мангл'ился
     Nova_Vec____Nova_Option____nova_int_p ≠ definition NovaOpt_nova_int → CC-FAIL.
  5. binop dispatch: указатель на option (NovaOpt_X*) и double-Nova-ptr (Nova_X**)
     исключены из option-equality / sum-plus веток → routed к typed pointer
     arithmetic (раньше «unsupported operator Add on option» / «indirection
     requires pointer operand»).
  6. apply_type_subst_to_ref: добавлен Pointer/Mut/Unsafe arm — generic free fn
     `alloc_buf[T] -> *mut T` теперь infer'ит nova_int*/Nova_Pt** на call-site
     (раньше void* → CC-FAIL deref-on-int).
  7. match Some(p)-binding: desanitize fallback (Nova_Point_p → Nova_Point*)
     когда novaopt_value_types ещё не заполнен.

stdlib-нюанс: vec_owned.nv объявляет module-private `external fn panic` (как
std/ffi/cstr.nv) — prelude panic не виден в consuming-модуле при cross-module
inline, а явный prelude-import тригерит R27 auto-import opt-out.

ТЕСТЫ: nova_tests/plan131 — 28/28 PASS (14 Ф.2 базовых + 11 позитивных Vec +
3 негативных). Ключевые: vec_option_elem (Vec[Option[int]]), vec_record_elem
(Vec[Point]), vec_nested (Vec[Vec[int]]), vec_grow (1000 push). vec_owned.nv
встроенные test — 7/7 PASS.

ИЗВЕСТНОЕ ОГРАНИЧЕНИЕ: Vec[NamedTuple] (`type Pair(int, str)` как generic-arg)
НЕ first-class — value-type by-value mono для Vec[NamedTuple] вне scope Ф.3
(push эрейзится к void*, call-site mangle расходится). Acceptance-критерий
`Vec[(int,str)]` покрыт record-wrapper fallback (vec_tuple_elem_pos использует
`type Pair { first int, second str }`) per документированный fallback плана.
Followup: [M-131.3-namedtuple-vec-elem].

================================================================================
Plan 131 — Vec[T] in Nova (CLOSED) — 2026-06-08
================================================================================

МОТИВАЦИЯ: []Option[T]/[]tuple не работали (value-struct > 8 байт не влезает
в int64-слот erasure). Vec[T] — полноценный Nova-тип с typed storage для любого T.

СДЕЛАНО:
Ф.1 RawMem.alloc: nova_alloc/nova_alloc_uncollectable/nova_free_uncollectable
  доступны из Nova. external fn #unsafe + emit_c.rs dispatch registration.
Ф.2 Codegen: ptr+n (BinOp::Add на *T), *ptr=v (Assign{target:Deref}),
  p as *mut T (As-cast к pointer type). C pointer arithmetic уже scaled.
Ф.3 Vec[T]: type Vec[T]{data *mut T, len int, cap int}. Полный API:
  push/pop/insert/remove/swap_remove/get/first/last/clear/truncate/reverse/
  reserve/shrink_to/shrink_to_fit/extend/append/retain/as_slice. Grow x2.
Ф.4 Протоколы: Iterable (for-in), Eq (==), Clone (.clone()), DebugPrintable.
Ф.5 Спека: D231 RawMem.alloc, D232 Vec[T], D216 amend ptr arith codegen,
  Q-vec-vs-slice, docs/collections/vec-owned.md.

КЛЮЧЕВОЙ РЕЗУЛЬТАТ: Vec[Option[int]], Vec[Record], Vec[Vec[int]] работают
без int64-erasure. Закрыт [M-91.1-value-struct-array-elem].

МЕТОД: 6-phase sequential workflow. Probe -> alloc -> codegen fix -> Nova impl ->
protocols -> spec. Полная регрессия 0 новых FAIL.

2026-06-09: Plan 118.1.7 — unsafe fn keyword syntax. Migrated #unsafe fn attribute to unsafe fn type keyword. 17+ files. E_UNSAFE_ATTR_DEPRECATED hard error. D2 + D216 §9 amend.
================================================================================
Plan 132 — Remove bound method value obj.@method (CLOSED) — 2026-06-09
================================================================================

МОТИВАЦИЯ: Bound method value (`obj.@method`) несёт closure-overhead и создаёт
давление на изобретение форм вроде `@@len` / `@.@len` при коллизии поля и
метода с одним именем. Лямбда `|| obj.method()` — явная замена без
специальной семантики.

СДЕЛАНО:
Ф.1 Parser/Checker: E_BOUND_METHOD_REMOVED для `obj.@method` и `obj.@method(args)`.
  `Type.@method` (unbound) оставлен. Checker: field+method одного имени легальны.
Ф.2 Migration: spec/decisions/03-syntax.md, spec/syntax.md, nova_tests/syntax/
  method_values.nv, examples/ffi/sqlite_mini.nv — всё перемигрировано на
  лямбды / прямые вызовы.
Ф.3 POS fixtures: pos_field_method_same_name.nv + pos_at_name_disambiguation.nv
  (оба PASS). Probe-файл удалён.
Ф.4 Spec/docs: D35 «Bound vs unbound» переписан, C-runtime представление
  обновлено, D117 диагностика скорректирована. simplifications.md + project-
  creation.txt + discussion-log + plan file closed.

КЛЮЧЕВОЕ РЕШЕНИЕ: Тактическое удаление (не редизайн). Unbound `Type.@method`
оставлен — это просто fn-pointer на объявленную функцию, никакого self-binding.
Побочный эффект: поле и метод с одним именем на типе теперь легальны.

ТЕСТЫ: plan132/ — 4 PASS (2 NEG + 1 POS unbound + 2 POS field-method-same-name
+ 1 POS disambiguation). nova_tests/syntax/method_values.nv — PASS.

2026-06-09: Plan 132.1 — Fix codegen bug: @name() self-call when field/method share name.
Variant B fix in emit_call (SelfAccess early path). pos_at_name_disambiguation fully restored.

[2026-06-09] Plan 133: Remove usize/isize. int = intptr_t (signed address-sized).
             nova_int: int64_t→intptr_t; nova_uint: uintptr_t added; i64 separate from int.
[2026-06-09] Plan 134: Remove ptr builtin. *() = void* (pointer-to-unit = void*).
             nova_ptr typedef removed. 4 codegen bugs fixed (tuple mono + .0 on void* newtype).

2026-06-09: Plan 135 — recv-mut overload dispatch ✅ ЗАКРЫТ.
Реализован dispatch по receiver-mutability для одноимённых методов (аналог C++ const-overloading).
Ф.1: C-name mangling — fn T @m() → Nova_T_method_m (ro), fn T mut @m() → Nova_T_method_m__mut.
Ф.2: Call-site dispatch — тай-брейк по mutability receiver'а: ro a → ro overload, mut b → mut overload.
  Добавлено поле current_receiver_is_mut в CEmitter; mangle_fn тай-брейк в двух путях.
Ф.3: 8 POS + 2 NEG fixtures (nova_tests/plan135/). Все PASS.
КЛЮЧЕВОЕ РЕШЕНИЕ: первая перегрузка сохраняет base_c_name; вторая с теми же param-типами
  получает __mut суффикс (mut receiver) или __ro (ro receiver при коллизии).
  Fallback: нет mut overload → ro overload используется для любого receiver.
D84 (10-overloading.md) обновлён: ось «receiver-mutability» теперь ✅ ACTIVE.

================================================================================
Plan 108.4 — Protocol method @ + receiver mutability (CLOSED) — 2026-06-09
================================================================================

МОТИВАЦИЯ: После Plan 108.1/108.2/108.3 (default-ro для params/locals/loops/
patterns), protocol method declarations остались единственной позицией с implicit
default-mut. Двойная inconsistency: нет @, нет mut modifier. After Plan 108.x
семантика была: params/locals/loops/patterns — всё default-ro, но в protocol
declaration ни @ ни modifier. Plan 108.4 closes both gaps.

СДЕЛАНО:
Ф.1 Parser: @ required in protocol methods; ReceiverMutability (Ro/Mut/Consume)
  field in EffectMethod AST; parse_effect_methods(is_protocol: bool) — protocol
  mode requires @; E_PROTO_METHOD_NEEDS_AT (bare ident без @) +
  E_PROTO_METHOD_MOD_CONFLICT (mut consume @foo() и другие конфликты).
Ф.2 Type-checker: check_receiver_mut_match() в verify_impl_protocols; 4 errors:
  E_PROTO_IMPL_RO_FOR_MUT, E_PROTO_IMPL_MUT_FOR_RO, E_PROTO_IMPL_MUT_FOR_CONSUME,
  E_PROTO_IMPL_CONSUME_FOR_MUT. emit_c.rs: synthesized default-protocol-method
  bodies используют m.receiver_mut (было hardcoded false).
Ф.3 Stdlib migration: std/prelude/collections.nv (Iterable → mut @next()),
  std/prelude/protocols.nv (Into/TryInto/Hashable/Equatable/Comparable/Cloneable/
  Printable/DebugPrintable/Consumable/WithExitTimeout), std/testing/property.nv
  (Generator @generate()/@shrink()). 57 nova_tests/ files migrated.
  Bootstrap parser comment удалён из collections.nv.
Ф.4 Tests: 13/13 PASS в nova_tests/plan108_4/:
  6 POS (pos_mut_next_match, pos_ro_hash_match, pos_consume_close_match,
         pos_default_ro_match, pos_impl_annotation_match, pos_recv_mut_match,
         pos_receiver_at_parse)
  6 NEG type-checker (neg_ro_for_mut, neg_mut_for_ro, neg_mut_for_consume,
                      neg_consume_for_mut)
  2 NEG parser (neg_method_needs_at, neg_mod_conflict_mut_consume)
Ф.5 Spec/docs: D209 NEW в 04-effects.md; D58/D72/D186 amends.

КЛЮЧЕВЫЕ РЕШЕНИЯ:
- @ обязателен в protocol — mirrors impl syntax (fn T @method()); visual distinction
  от effect { } blocks (нет receiver → нет @)
- Default receiver = ro (consistent с Plan 108.x default-ro family)
- Effect { } blocks без изменений — функции без receiver, нет @
- Static methods в protocol: .method() (leading dot) — без изменений

НОВЫЕ ERROR CODES (8 total):
Parser: E_PROTO_METHOD_NEEDS_AT, E_PROTO_METHOD_MOD_CONFLICT
Checker: E_PROTO_IMPL_RO_FOR_MUT, E_PROTO_IMPL_MUT_FOR_RO,
         E_PROTO_IMPL_MUT_FOR_CONSUME, E_PROTO_IMPL_CONSUME_FOR_MUT

COMMITS: e620a09d94a (Ф.1) + e7cdbd8f83c (Ф.2 + Ф.3 migration) +
         abc25d196c6 (Ф.4) + bbbeb9ce6bd (Ф.5)
